[V2.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29821462/V2.txt)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#0a0a0f">
<title>Trader Ghost Journals</title>
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#000000;
  --bg-1:#000000;
  --card:#050507;
  --card-2:#08080b;
  --input:#0b0b0f;
  --border:rgba(160,70,245,.6);
  --border-soft:rgba(160,70,245,.28);
  --purple:#a855f7;
  --purple-2:#7b0fd9;
  --purple-dim:#4c0088;
  --purple-glow:rgba(160,70,245,.25);
  --green:#22c55e;
  --green-dim:rgba(34,197,94,.15);
  --red:#f43f5e;
  --red-dim:rgba(244,63,94,.15);
  --gray:#7a7a90;
  --text:#f2f1f7;
  --text-dim:#9c9caf;
  --text-faint:#5f5f76;
  --radius:28px;
  --radius-sm:18px;
  --mono: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", "Cascadia Code", Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
  --sans: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Inter, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
}
[data-theme="light"]{
  --bg:#f3f1f8; --bg-1:#ffffff; --card:#ffffff; --card-2:#f6f4fb; --input:#ece9f5;
  --border:#e2ddf0; --border-soft:#ece9f5;
  --text:#181822; --text-dim:#5d5d72; --text-faint:#8f8fa5;
  --green-dim:rgba(34,197,94,.12); --red-dim:rgba(244,63,94,.12);
}
*{box-sizing:border-box;}
html,body{margin:0;padding:0;}
html{overflow-x:hidden;}
body{
  background: var(--bg);
  color:var(--text);
  font-family:var(--sans);
  min-height:100vh;
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  overflow-x:hidden;
}
button,input,select,textarea,.card,.row-item,.journal-item,.stats-row,.nav-item,.badge,.pill{
  max-width:100%;
}
.card,.row-item,.journal-item,.stats-row,.nav-item,.modal,.field,.field label,.card-title,.card-sub,.j-text{
  overflow-wrap:anywhere;
  word-break:break-word;
}
::selection{ background:var(--purple-dim); color:#fff; }
a{color:inherit;}
button{font-family:inherit;}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:8px;height:8px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:8px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent;}
.num{font-family:var(--mono);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}

.app{ display:flex; min-height:100vh; }
.sidebar{
  width:250px; flex:0 0 250px; background:var(--bg-1); border-right:1px solid var(--border-soft);
  display:flex; flex-direction:column; padding:20px 14px; position:sticky; top:0; height:100vh; overflow-y:auto;
  transition:transform .25s ease;
  z-index:60;
}
.brand{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; padding:6px 6px 20px; }
.brand-logo{
  width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;flex:0 0 46px;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--border), 0 0 10px var(--purple-glow);
  animation:float 5s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.brand-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;}
@keyframes float{ 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);} 50%{transform:translateY(-3px);} }
.brand-text{ line-height:1.15; }
.brand-text .t1{ font-size:11px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:.18em; color:var(--text-dim); }
.brand-text .t2{ font-size:19px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:.02em;
  background:linear-gradient(120deg,#e0b3ff,var(--purple) 45%,#c026d3,#7c3aed);
  -webkit-background-clip:text; background-clip:text; color:transparent;
  text-shadow:0 0 12px var(--purple-glow);
}
.brand-text .t3{ font-size:11px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.14em; color:var(--text-faint); }

.nav{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px; margin-top:4px; }
.nav-item{
  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; padding:10px 12px; border-radius:10px;
  color:var(--text-dim); font-size:13.5px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; border:1px solid transparent;
  background:transparent; text-align:left; width:100%;
}
.nav-item .ic{ width:18px; text-align:center; font-size:15px; }
.nav-item:hover{ background:var(--card); color:var(--text); }
.nav-item.active{
  background:linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(150,60,230,.16), rgba(150,60,230,.04));
  color:#fff; border-color:var(--border);
  box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--purple-glow), inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(150,60,230,.35);
}

.side-quote{
  margin-top:auto; padding:14px; border-radius:var(--radius-sm); background:var(--card);
  border:1px solid var(--border-soft); font-size:12px; color:var(--text-dim); line-height:1.5;
  display:flex; gap:10px; align-items:flex-start;
}
.side-quote img{ width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:8px;flex:0 0 28px; opacity:.9; }
.theme-row{ margin-top:14px; }
.theme-row .lbl{ font-size:11px; color:var(--text-faint); font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.08em; margin:0 0 8px 2px; text-transform:uppercase;}
.theme-toggle{ display:flex; gap:6px; background:var(--card); border:1px solid var(--border-soft); border-radius:10px; padding:4px; }
.theme-toggle button{ flex:1; border:none; background:transparent; color:var(--text-faint); padding:7px 0; border-radius:7px; cursor:pointer; font-size:14px;}
.theme-toggle button.active{ background:var(--purple-2); color:#fff; }

.profile-card{ margin-top:14px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:10px; border-radius:var(--radius-sm); background:var(--card); border:1px solid var(--border-soft);}
.profile-card img{ width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:9px; }
.profile-card .name{ font-size:13px; font-weight:700; }
.profile-card .plan{ font-size:11px; color:var(--purple); font-weight:700; }

.side-foot{ margin-top:12px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; font-size:11px; color:var(--text-faint); padding:0 4px; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:4px;}
.pill{ display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; padding:3px 9px; border-radius:999px; font-size:10.5px; font-weight:700; }
.pill.purple{ background:rgba(168,85,247,.15); color:var(--purple); border:1px solid rgba(168,85,247,.3); }
.pill.green{ background:var(--green-dim); color:var(--green); }
.dot{ width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%; background:var(--green); box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--green);}

.main{ flex:1; min-width:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
.topbar{
  position:sticky; top:0; z-index:50; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px;
  padding:16px 28px; background:rgba(8,8,13,.75); backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-soft); flex-wrap:wrap;
}
[data-theme="light"] .topbar{ background:rgba(255,255,255,.75); }
.menu-btn{ display:none; background:var(--card); border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text); width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; font-size:16px;}
.page-title{ font-size:19px; font-weight:800; margin-right:auto; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;}
.daterange{
  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:var(--card); border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:7px 12px; border-radius:10px; font-size:12.5px; color:var(--text-dim); font-weight:600;
}
.daterange button{ background:transparent; border:none; color:var(--text-dim); cursor:pointer; font-size:13px; }
.icon-btn{ width:38px;height:38px; border-radius:13px; background:var(--card); border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text-dim); cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:15px; position:relative;}
.icon-btn:hover{ color:var(--text); border-color:var(--purple-dim); }
.btn-primary{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple), #7c3aed); color:#fff; border:none; padding:10px 18px;
  border-radius:14px; font-weight:700; font-size:13.5px; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
  box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(150,60,230,.22), 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
}
.btn-primary:hover{ filter:brightness(1.08); }
.btn-ghost{ background:var(--card); border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text); padding:9px 16px; border-radius:14px; font-weight:600; font-size:13px; cursor:pointer;}
.btn-danger{ background:var(--red-dim); border:1px solid rgba(244,63,94,.3); color:var(--red); padding:9px 16px; border-radius:14px; font-weight:700; font-size:13px; cursor:pointer;}

.content{ padding:24px 28px 60px; }
body.density-compact .content{ padding:14px 18px 40px; }
body.density-compact .card{ padding:12px 14px; }
body.density-compact .grid{ gap:12px; }
body.density-compact table.tbl td{ padding:7px 8px; }
body.density-compact table.tbl th{ padding:0 8px 7px; }
body.density-compact .journal-item{ padding:9px 0; gap:10px; }
body.density-compact .row-item{ padding:8px 10px; margin-bottom:6px; }
body.density-compact .card-head{ margin-bottom:8px; }
.page{ display:none; animation:fadein .25s ease; }
.page.active{ display:block; }
@keyframes fadein{ from{opacity:0; transform:translateY(4px);} to{opacity:1; transform:translateY(0);} }

.grid{ display:grid; gap:18px; min-width:0; }
.grid > *{ min-width:0; }
.g-stats{ grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr)); }
.g-2col{ grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.6fr) minmax(0,1fr); }
.g-2colr{ grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(0,1.6fr); }
.g-3{ grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)); }
.g-2{ grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)); }

.card{ background:var(--card); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:18px 20px;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(160,70,245,.1), 0 0 12px var(--purple-glow); }
.card-head{ display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:14px; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap;}
.card-title{ font-size:14.5px; font-weight:800; }
.card-sub{ font-size:12px; color:var(--text-faint); font-weight:600;}
.select-mini{ background:var(--input); border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text-dim); font-size:12px; padding:6px 10px; border-radius:8px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer;}
.link-mini{ font-size:12px; color:var(--purple); font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; background:none; border:none;}

.stat-card{ position:relative; overflow:hidden; min-width:0; }
.stat-label{ font-size:12px; color:var(--text-faint); font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px;}
.stat-value{ font-size:26px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:-.02em; }
.stat-delta{ font-size:11.5px; font-weight:700; margin-top:8px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px;}
.stat-delta.up{ color:var(--green); }
.stat-delta.down{ color:var(--red); }
.stat-mini-chart{ position:absolute; right:14px; bottom:14px; opacity:.85; }

.legend-dot{ width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:3px; display:inline-block; margin-right:6px;}
.chart-legend{ display:flex; gap:16px; font-size:12px; color:var(--text-dim); font-weight:600;}

table.tbl{ width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:13px; table-layout:fixed; }
table.tbl th{ text-align:left; color:var(--text-faint); font-weight:700; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:.05em; text-transform:uppercase; padding:0 10px 10px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-soft);}
table.tbl td{ padding:11px 10px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-soft); overflow-wrap:anywhere; word-break:break-word; min-width:0; }
table.tbl tr:last-child td{ border-bottom:none; }
table.tbl tr:hover td{ background:var(--card-2); cursor:pointer; }
.badge{ display:inline-block; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:7px; font-size:11.5px; font-weight:700; }
.badge.long{ background:rgba(34,197,94,.12); color:var(--green); }
.badge.short{ background:rgba(244,63,94,.12); color:var(--red); }
.badge.win{ background:var(--green-dim); color:var(--green); }
.badge.loss{ background:var(--red-dim); color:var(--red); }
.badge.be{ background:rgba(122,122,144,.15); color:var(--gray); }
.pnl-pos{ color:var(--green); font-weight:700; }
.pnl-neg{ color:var(--red); font-weight:700; }

.stats-list{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0; }
.stats-row{ display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:10px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-soft); font-size:13px;}
.stats-row:last-child{ border-bottom:none; }
.stats-row .k{ color:var(--text-dim); font-weight:600; }
.stats-row .v{ font-weight:800; }

.journal-item{ display:flex; gap:14px; padding:14px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-soft); }
.journal-item:last-child{ border-bottom:none; }
.j-date{ width:44px;height:44px;flex:0 0 44px; border-radius:14px; background:var(--card-2); border:1px solid var(--border); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-weight:800; font-size:15px; color:var(--purple);}
.j-body{ flex:1; min-width:0; }
.j-date-label{ font-size:11.5px; color:var(--text-faint); font-weight:700; margin-bottom:3px;}
.j-text{ font-size:13px; color:var(--text-dim); line-height:1.5; margin-bottom:8px; }
.j-tags{ display:flex; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.tagchip{ font-size:11px; font-weight:700; padding:3px 9px; border-radius:6px; background:var(--card-2); border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text-dim); }

.mini-cal{ width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; }
.mini-cal th{ font-size:10.5px; color:var(--text-faint); font-weight:700; padding:4px 0; }
.mini-cal td{ text-align:center; padding:4px 2px; font-size:12px; }
.mini-cal .day{ width:30px;height:30px; border-radius:9px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin:0 auto; cursor:pointer; color:var(--text-dim); position:relative;}
.mini-cal .day:hover{ background:var(--card-2); }
.mini-cal .day.today{ background:var(--purple-2); color:#fff; font-weight:800;}
.mini-cal .day.win::after{ content:''; position:absolute; bottom:2px; width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%; background:var(--green);}
.mini-cal .day.loss::after{ content:''; position:absolute; bottom:2px; width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%; background:var(--red);}
.mini-cal .day.muted{ color:var(--text-faint); opacity:.35; }

.footbar{ display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:14px 4px 0; font-size:12px; color:var(--text-faint); font-weight:600; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px;}
.footbar .l{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; }

.field{ margin-bottom:14px; }
.field label{ display:block; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-dim); margin-bottom:6px;}
.field input, .field select, .field textarea{
  width:100%; background:var(--input); border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text);
  padding:10px 12px; border-radius:9px; font-size:13.5px; font-family:inherit;
}
.field input:focus, .field select:focus, .field textarea:focus{ outline:2px solid var(--purple-dim); border-color:var(--purple); }
.field textarea{ resize:vertical; min-height:80px; }
.field-row{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px; }
.field-row3{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:12px; }
.chip-picker{ display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:7px; }
.chip-opt{ padding:6px 12px; border-radius:8px; background:var(--input); border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text-dim); font-size:12px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; }
.chip-opt.sel{ background:var(--purple-2); border-color:var(--purple-2); color:#fff; }
.mood-picker{ display:flex; gap:8px; }
.mood-opt{ font-size:22px; padding:6px 10px; border-radius:9px; background:var(--input); border:1px solid var(--border); cursor:pointer; filter:grayscale(1); opacity:.5;}
.mood-opt.sel{ filter:none; opacity:1; background:rgba(168,85,247,.15); border-color:var(--purple);}
.dir-toggle{ display:flex; gap:8px; }
.dir-btn{ flex:1; padding:10px; border-radius:9px; background:var(--input); border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text-dim); font-weight:800; cursor:pointer; text-align:center;}
.dir-btn.long.sel{ background:var(--green-dim); color:var(--green); border-color:var(--green);}
.dir-btn.short.sel{ background:var(--red-dim); color:var(--red); border-color:var(--red);}

.modal-bg{ position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(4,4,8,.7); backdrop-filter:blur(3px); display:none; align-items:flex-start; justify-content:center; z-index:200; padding:40px 16px; overflow-y:auto;}
.modal-bg.show{ display:flex; }
.modal{ background:var(--bg-1); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:24px; width:100%; max-width:560px; padding:24px; box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5); animation:modalin .2s ease; }
@keyframes modalin{ from{opacity:0; transform:translateY(8px) scale(.98);} to{opacity:1; transform:none;} }
.modal-head{ display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:18px;}
.modal-head h3{ margin:0; font-size:17px; font-weight:800;}
.modal-close{ background:var(--card); border:1px solid var(--border); color:var(--text-dim); width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;}
.modal-actions{ display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; gap:10px; margin-top:18px;}
.file-drop{ border:1.5px dashed var(--border); border-radius:14px; padding:16px; text-align:center; font-size:12px; color:var(--text-faint); cursor:pointer; }
.file-drop img{ max-width:100%; max-height:140px; border-radius:8px; margin-top:8px;}

.goal-card{ margin-bottom:14px; }
.goal-top{ display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:13px; font-weight:700; margin-bottom:8px;}
.progress-track{ height:9px; border-radius:6px; background:var(--input); overflow:hidden;}
.progress-fill{ height:100%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--purple-2),var(--purple)); border-radius:6px; transition:width .4s ease;}
.goal-meta{ font-size:11.5px; color:var(--text-faint); margin-top:7px; font-weight:600;}

.row-item{ display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:12px 14px; border-radius:16px; background:var(--card-2); border:1px solid var(--border-soft); margin-bottom:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px;}
.row-item .l{ font-size:13.5px; font-weight:700; }
.row-item .r{ display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:center; }
.icon-sm{ background:transparent; border:none; color:var(--text-faint); cursor:pointer; font-size:14px; padding:4px;}
.icon-sm:hover{ color:var(--text); }
.color-dot{ width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:4px; display:inline-block; margin-right:8px;}

.empty-state{ text-align:center; padding:50px 20px; color:var(--text-faint); }
.empty-state img{ width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:16px; opacity:.5; margin-bottom:14px;}
.empty-state .t{ font-weight:700; color:var(--text-dim); margin-bottom:4px;}

.cal-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr); gap:6px; }
.cal-head{ text-align:center; font-size:11px; color:var(--text-faint); font-weight:700; padding-bottom:6px;}
.cal-cell{ aspect-ratio:1; border-radius:14px; background:var(--card-2); border:1px solid var(--border-soft); padding:6px; cursor:pointer; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:space-between; position:relative;}
.cal-cell:hover{ border-color:var(--purple-dim); }
.cal-cell.muted{ opacity:.3; }
.cal-cell.today{ border-color:var(--purple); box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--purple);}
.cal-cell .dnum{ font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:var(--text-dim); }
.cal-cell .dpnl{ font-size:11px; font-weight:800; }
.cal-cell.win{ background:rgba(34,197,94,.10); }
.cal-cell.loss{ background:rgba(244,63,94,.08); }

.search-input{ background:var(--card); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:14px; padding:9px 14px; font-size:13px; color:var(--text); min-width:220px;}
.info-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:14px; }
.info-card{ background:var(--card-2); border:1px solid var(--border-soft); border-radius:14px; padding:14px; min-width:0; }
.info-card h4{ margin:0 0 8px; font-size:13.5px; }
.info-card p,.info-card li{ color:var(--text-dim); font-size:12.5px; line-height:1.55; }
.info-card ul{ margin:8px 0 0; padding-left:18px; }
.calc-note{ font-size:11.5px; color:var(--text-faint); line-height:1.45; margin-top:6px; }
.fit-table-wrap{ width:100%; max-width:100%; overflow-x:auto; }
canvas{ max-width:100%; display:block; }
.field-row,.field-row3,.dir-toggle,.chip-picker,.topbar,.chart-legend,.stats-row,.journal-item{ min-width:0; }
.stat-label,.stat-value,.stat-delta,.badge,.pill,.card-title,.card-sub,.k,.v{ overflow-wrap:anywhere; word-break:break-word; }

@media (max-width: 1200px){
  .g-stats{ grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)); }
  .g-3{ grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)); }
}
@media (max-width: 980px){
  .g-stats{ grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)); }
  .g-2col,.g-2colr{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .g-3{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .g-2{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .info-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .sidebar{ position:fixed; left:0; transform:translateX(-100%); box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5); }
  .sidebar.open{ transform:translateX(0); }
  .menu-btn{ display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; }
  .content{ padding:18px 14px 50px; }
  .topbar{ padding:14px 16px; }
  .field-row,.field-row3{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
}
@media (max-width: 720px){
  .topbar{ gap:10px; }
  .page-title{ width:100%; margin-right:0; }
  .daterange{ min-width:0; }
  .btn-primary,.btn-ghost,.btn-danger,.icon-btn{ max-width:100%; }
}
@media (max-width: 560px){
  .cal-grid{ gap:4px; }
  .cal-cell{ padding:3px; border-radius:8px; }
  .cal-cell .dnum{ font-size:10px; }
  .cal-cell .dpnl{ font-size:8.5px; }
  .cal-head{ font-size:9px; padding-bottom:3px; }
  .daterange span{ display:none; }
  .stat-value{ font-size:21px; }
  table.tbl{ font-size:11.5px; }
  table.tbl th{ font-size:9.5px; }
}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
  *{ animation-duration:.001s !important; transition-duration:.001s !important; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="loader" style="position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg);z-index:999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;">
  <img id="loaderImg" style="width:88px;height:88px;border-radius:22px;box-shadow:0 0 40px var(--purple-glow);animation:float 2s ease-in-out infinite;" alt="Trader Ghost">
  <div style="font-family:var(--sans);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.05em;color:var(--text-dim);font-size:13px;">LOADING YOUR JOURNAL…</div>
</div>

<div class="app">
  <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
    <div class="brand">
      <div class="brand-logo"><img id="logoImg" alt="Trader Ghost"></div>
      <div class="brand-text">
        <div class="t1">TRADER</div>
        <div class="t2">GHOST</div>
        <div class="t3">JOURNALS</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <nav class="nav" id="navList"></nav>
    <div class="side-quote">
      <img id="quoteImg" alt="">
      <div>Keep journaling. Keep improving.<br>Become the ghost in the charts. 👻</div>
    </div>
    <div class="theme-row">
      <div class="lbl">Theme</div>
      <div class="theme-toggle" id="themeToggle">
        <button data-t="light" title="Light">☀️</button>
        <button data-t="dark" title="Dark">🌙</button>
        <button data-t="system" title="System">💻</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="profile-card">
      <img id="profileImg" alt="">
      <div>
        <div class="name" id="profileName">Trader Ghost</div>
        <div class="plan">⚡ Pro Plan</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="side-foot">
      <span>v2.0.0</span>
      <span class="pill purple">PWA</span>
      <span class="pill green"><span class="dot"></span>Offline Ready</span>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <div class="main">
    <div class="topbar">
      <button class="menu-btn" id="menuBtn">☰</button>
      <div class="page-title" id="pageTitle">Dashboard</div>
      <div class="daterange" id="dateRangeBtn"><button id="drPrev">‹</button><span id="drLabel">This Week</span><button id="drNext">›</button></div>
      <button class="icon-btn" title="Search" id="searchBtn">🔍</button>
      <button class="icon-btn" title="Notifications" id="notifBtn">🔔</button>
      <button class="btn-primary" id="newTradeBtn">＋ New Trade</button>
    </div>
    <div class="content" id="content"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="modal-bg" id="modalBg"><div class="modal" id="modalBox"></div></div>

<script>
(function(){
"use strict";

/* ---------- Icon / branding ---------- */
const GHOST_ICON = "data:image/png;base64,";

function setBranding(){
  document.getElementById('logoImg').src = GHOST_ICON;
  document.getElementById('quoteImg').src = GHOST_ICON;
  document.getElementById('profileImg').src = GHOST_ICON;
  document.getElementById('loaderImg').src = GHOST_ICON;
  applyProfileName();
  const link = document.createElement('link');
  link.rel = 'icon'; link.type='image/png'; link.href = GHOST_ICON;
  document.head.appendChild(link);
  const apple = document.createElement('link');
  apple.rel = 'apple-touch-icon'; apple.href = GHOST_ICON;
  document.head.appendChild(apple);
  // PWA manifest via blob
  try{
    const manifest = {
      name:"Trader Ghost Journals", short_name:"Ghost Journal",
      start_url:".", display:"standalone", background_color:"#08080d", theme_color:"#08080d",
      icons:[{src:GHOST_ICON, sizes:"512x512", type:"image/png"},{src:GHOST_ICON, sizes:"192x192", type:"image/png"}]
    };
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(manifest)], {type:'application/json'});
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const m = document.createElement('link'); m.rel='manifest'; m.href=url;
    document.head.appendChild(m);
  }catch(e){ console.warn('manifest skipped', e); }
  // best-effort offline cache via service worker (blob-based, same-origin only)
  if('serviceWorker' in navigator){
    try{
      const swCode = "self.addEventListener('install',e=>self.skipWaiting());"+
        "self.addEventListener('activate',e=>self.clients.claim());"+
        "self.addEventListener('fetch',e=>{e.respondWith(fetch(e.request).catch(()=>caches.match(e.request)));});";
      const swBlob = new Blob([swCode], {type:'application/javascript'});
      const swUrl = URL.createObjectURL(swBlob);
      navigator.serviceWorker.register(swUrl).catch(()=>{});
    }catch(e){ /* offline registration best-effort only */ }
  }
}

/* ---------- Storage ---------- */
const LS_KEY = 'ghostjournal:v2';
function loadState(){
  try{
    const raw = localStorage.getItem(LS_KEY);
    if(raw) return JSON.parse(raw);
  }catch(e){ console.warn('load failed', e); }
  return null;
}
const FUTURES_SPECS = {
  ES:{name:'E-mini S&P 500', tickSize:0.25, tickValue:12.50, pointValue:50},
  MES:{name:'Micro E-mini S&P 500', tickSize:0.25, tickValue:1.25, pointValue:5},
  NQ:{name:'E-mini Nasdaq-100', tickSize:0.25, tickValue:5.00, pointValue:20},
  MNQ:{name:'Micro E-mini Nasdaq-100', tickSize:0.25, tickValue:0.50, pointValue:2},
  YM:{name:'E-mini Dow', tickSize:1, tickValue:5.00, pointValue:5},
  MYM:{name:'Micro E-mini Dow', tickSize:1, tickValue:0.50, pointValue:0.5},
  RTY:{name:'E-mini Russell 2000', tickSize:0.10, tickValue:5.00, pointValue:50},
  M2K:{name:'Micro E-mini Russell 2000', tickSize:0.10, tickValue:0.50, pointValue:5},
  CL:{name:'Crude Oil', tickSize:0.01, tickValue:10.00, pointValue:1000},
  MCL:{name:'Micro Crude Oil', tickSize:0.01, tickValue:1.00, pointValue:100},
  GC:{name:'Gold', tickSize:0.10, tickValue:10.00, pointValue:100},
  MGC:{name:'Micro Gold', tickSize:0.10, tickValue:1.00, pointValue:10},
  SI:{name:'Silver', tickSize:0.005, tickValue:25.00, pointValue:5000},
  SIL:{name:'Micro Silver', tickSize:0.005, tickValue:5.00, pointValue:1000},
  HG:{name:'Copper', tickSize:0.0005, tickValue:12.50, pointValue:25000},
  ZB:{name:'30-Year Treasury Bond', tickSize:1/32, tickValue:31.25, pointValue:1000},
  ZN:{name:'10-Year Treasury Note', tickSize:1/64, tickValue:15.625, pointValue:1000},
  ZF:{name:'5-Year Treasury Note', tickSize:1/128, tickValue:7.8125, pointValue:1000},
  ZT:{name:'2-Year Treasury Note', tickSize:1/256, tickValue:7.8125, pointValue:2000},
  '6E':{name:'Euro FX', tickSize:0.00005, tickValue:6.25, pointValue:125000},
  M6E:{name:'Micro Euro FX', tickSize:0.0001, tickValue:1.25, pointValue:12500},
  '6B':{name:'British Pound FX', tickSize:0.0001, tickValue:6.25, pointValue:62500},
  M6B:{name:'Micro British Pound FX', tickSize:0.0001, tickValue:0.625, pointValue:6250},
  '6J':{name:'Japanese Yen FX', tickSize:0.0000005, tickValue:6.25, pointValue:12500000},
  '6A':{name:'Australian Dollar FX', tickSize:0.0001, tickValue:10.00, pointValue:100000},
  '6C':{name:'Canadian Dollar FX', tickSize:0.00005, tickValue:5.00, pointValue:100000},
  '6S':{name:'Swiss Franc FX', tickSize:0.0001, tickValue:12.50, pointValue:125000},
  MGCN:{name:'Micro Gold Weekly', tickSize:0.10, tickValue:1.00, pointValue:10},
  QG:{name:'Natural Gas', tickSize:0.001, tickValue:10.00, pointValue:10000},
  NG:{name:'Henry Hub Natural Gas', tickSize:0.001, tickValue:10.00, pointValue:10000},
  QM:{name:'E-mini Crude Oil', tickSize:0.025, tickValue:12.50, pointValue:500},
  RB:{name:'RBOB Gasoline', tickSize:0.0001, tickValue:4.20, pointValue:42000},
  HO:{name:'Heating Oil', tickSize:0.0001, tickValue:4.20, pointValue:42000},
  ZC:{name:'Corn', tickSize:0.25, tickValue:12.50, pointValue:50},
  ZS:{name:'Soybeans', tickSize:0.25, tickValue:12.50, pointValue:50},
  ZW:{name:'Chicago Wheat', tickSize:0.25, tickValue:12.50, pointValue:50}
};

function seedState(){
  const today = new Date();
  function d(offset){ const t = new Date(today); t.setDate(t.getDate()-offset); return dateKey(t); }
  const trades = [
    {id:uid(),date:d(0),time:'09:32',asset:'EUR/USD',direction:'Long',entry:1.0821,exit:1.0856,size:1,pnl:342.50,rr:2.1,session:'London',setup:'Breakout',tags:['Trend'],notes:'Clean breakout of range high.'},
    {id:uid(),date:d(0),time:'11:05',asset:'NAS100',direction:'Short',entry:18820,exit:18775,size:0.5,pnl:215.30,rr:1.8,session:'New York',setup:'Reversal',tags:['News'],notes:'Faded the spike after CPI.'},
    {id:uid(),date:d(1),time:'10:12',asset:'XAU/USD',direction:'Long',entry:2352.4,exit:2348.1,size:0.3,pnl:-112.40,rr:-1,session:'London',setup:'Pullback',tags:['Mistake'],notes:'Entered too early, no confirmation.'},
    {id:uid(),date:d(1),time:'14:40',asset:'GBP/USD',direction:'Long',entry:1.2701,exit:1.2734,size:1,pnl:158.80,rr:1.6,session:'New York',setup:'Support Bounce',tags:['Trend'],notes:'Held above key support.'},
    {id:uid(),date:d(2),time:'09:50',asset:'US30',direction:'Short',entry:39880,exit:39790,size:0.4,pnl:287.60,rr:2.4,session:'New York',setup:'Breakout',tags:['Trend'],notes:'Broke down through VWAP.'},
    {id:uid(),date:d(3),time:'10:30',asset:'BTC/USD',direction:'Long',entry:67200,exit:67450,size:0.05,pnl:125.00,rr:1.4,session:'Asia',setup:'Range',tags:[],notes:''},
    {id:uid(),date:d(4),time:'13:15',asset:'EUR/USD',direction:'Short',entry:1.0865,exit:1.0871,size:1,pnl:-60.00,rr:-0.6,session:'London',setup:'Reversal',tags:['Mistake'],notes:'Chased the move.'},
  ];
  const journal = [
    {id:uid(),date:d(0),text:'Great day! Followed my plan perfectly. Waited for confirmation and took high probability setups.',tags:['Discipline','Plan','Patience'],mood:'😄'},
    {id:uid(),date:d(1),text:'Revenge traded after loss. Need to work on emotional control and stick to my rules.',tags:['Emotion','Revenge','Mindset'],mood:'😤'},
    {id:uid(),date:d(2),text:'Solid session, stuck to risk limits even after two losers in a row.',tags:['Discipline','Risk'],mood:'🙂'},
  ];
  const goals = [
    {id:uid(),title:'Grow account to $150K',target:150000,current:112480,unit:'$',deadline:'2024-12-31'},
    {id:uid(),title:'Journal every trading day',target:30,current:22,unit:'days',deadline:'2024-06-30'},
    {id:uid(),title:'Keep max drawdown under 8%',target:8,current:4.6,unit:'%',deadline:'2024-12-31'},
  ];
  const notes = [
    {id:uid(),title:'Playbook: London Breakout',text:'Wait for the first 30m range, enter on confirmed break with volume, stop beyond range midpoint.',date:d(3)},
  ];
  const nonFuturesAssets = ['EUR/USD','GBP/USD','XAU/USD','NAS100','US30','BTC/USD'].map(n=>({id:uid(),name:n,category:/USD$/.test(n)&&n.length<=8?'Forex':/BTC/.test(n)?'Crypto':/XAU/.test(n)?'Metals':'Index'}));
  const futuresAssets = Object.keys(FUTURES_SPECS).map(sym=>({id:uid(),name:sym,category:'Futures'}));
  const assets = [...futuresAssets, ...nonFuturesAssets];
  const tags = [
    {id:uid(),name:'Discipline',color:'#a855f7'},
    {id:uid(),name:'Plan',color:'#a855f7'},
    {id:uid(),name:'Patience',color:'#a855f7'},
    {id:uid(),name:'Emotion',color:'#f43f5e'},
    {id:uid(),name:'Revenge',color:'#f43f5e'},
    {id:uid(),name:'Mindset',color:'#f59e0b'},
    {id:uid(),name:'Trend',color:'#22c55e'},
    {id:uid(),name:'Mistake',color:'#f43f5e'},
    {id:uid(),name:'News',color:'#38bdf8'},
    {id:uid(),name:'Risk',color:'#f59e0b'},
  ];
  const propAccounts = [
    {id:uid(), firm:'FTMO', size:100000, phase:'Phase 1', ddType:'Static', startingBalance:100000,
      currentEquity:104200, peakEquity:104200, profitTargetPct:10, maxDD:10000, dailyDD:5000, status:'Active', notes:''},
    {id:uid(), firm:'Apex Trader Funding', size:50000, phase:'Funded', ddType:'EOD Trailing', startingBalance:50000,
      currentEquity:52380, peakEquity:52900, profitTargetPct:0, maxDD:2000, dailyDD:0, status:'Funded', notes:'Safety net +$100 after payout'},
  ];
  return {trades, journal, goals, notes, assets, tags, propAccounts, settings:{
    theme:'dark', startingBalance:100000, currency:'$', density:'comfortable', displayName:'Trader Ghost',
    weekStart:'sun', confirmDelete:true, landingPage:'dashboard', defaultSize:1, defaultSession:'London'
  }};
}
let STATE = loadState() || seedState();
STATE.settings = Object.assign({
  theme:'dark', startingBalance:100000, currency:'$', density:'comfortable', displayName:'Trader Ghost',
  weekStart:'sun', confirmDelete:true, landingPage:'dashboard', defaultSize:1, defaultSession:'London'
}, STATE.settings||{});
if(!Array.isArray(STATE.propAccounts)) STATE.propAccounts = [];
if(!Array.isArray(STATE.assets)) STATE.assets = [];
(function ensureFuturesAssetsLoggable(){
  const existingNames = new Set(STATE.assets.map(a=>String(a.name||'').toUpperCase()));
  Object.keys(FUTURES_SPECS).forEach(sym=>{
    if(!existingNames.has(sym.toUpperCase())){
      STATE.assets.push({id:uid(), name:sym, category:'Futures'});
      existingNames.add(sym.toUpperCase());
    }
  });
})();
function persist(){
  try{ localStorage.setItem(LS_KEY, JSON.stringify(STATE)); markSaved(); }
  catch(e){ console.error('Save failed', e); }
  if(!SYNC.applyingRemote) schedulePush();
}
let savedTimeout;
function markSaved(){
  const el = document.getElementById('savedIndicator');
  if(el){ el.textContent = 'Auto-saved just now'; }
}

/* ---------- Device Sync (just a 6-digit PIN, no accounts/config) ---------- */
// Uses ntfy.sh, a free public pub/sub relay — no sign-up, no API keys.
// Both devices "tune in" to the same private channel derived from your PIN.
const SYNC_PIN_KEY = 'ghostjournal:sync:pin';
const SYNC_DEVICE_KEY = 'ghostjournal:sync:deviceId';
function getDeviceId(){
  let id = localStorage.getItem(SYNC_DEVICE_KEY);
  if(!id){ id = uid(); localStorage.setItem(SYNC_DEVICE_KEY, id); }
  return id;
}
const SYNC = {
  connected:false, pin:'', evtSource:null,
  applyingRemote:false, lastRemoteTs:0, pushTimer:null, seedTimer:null,
  status:'Not connected', deviceId:getDeviceId()
};
function syncTopic(pin){ return 'ghostjournal-v1-'+pin; }
function syncSetStatus(msg){
  SYNC.status = msg;
  const el = document.getElementById('syncStatusLine');
  if(el) el.textContent = msg;
}
function schedulePush(){
  if(!SYNC.connected) return;
  clearTimeout(SYNC.pushTimer);
  SYNC.pushTimer = setTimeout(pushToCloud, 700);
}
function pushToCloud(){
  if(!SYNC.connected) return;
  clearTimeout(SYNC.seedTimer);
  const payload = { state: STATE, updatedAt: Date.now(), deviceId: SYNC.deviceId };
  fetch('https://ntfy.sh/'+syncTopic(SYNC.pin), {
    method:'POST', body: JSON.stringify(payload)
  }).then(res=>{
    if(!res.ok) throw new Error('HTTP '+res.status);
    syncSetStatus('Synced just now ('+new Date().toLocaleTimeString()+')');
  }).catch(err=>{
    syncSetStatus('Sync error — check your connection. ('+(err && err.message ? err.message : err)+')');
  });
}
function applyRemoteSnapshot(data){
  if(!data || !data.state) return;
  if(data.deviceId === SYNC.deviceId) return; // our own write, ignore
  if(data.updatedAt && data.updatedAt <= SYNC.lastRemoteTs) return;
  SYNC.lastRemoteTs = data.updatedAt || Date.now();
  SYNC.applyingRemote = true;
  try{
    STATE = data.state;
    localStorage.setItem(LS_KEY, JSON.stringify(STATE));
    renderPage(); renderNav();
    syncSetStatus('Updated from another device ('+new Date().toLocaleTimeString()+')');
  } finally {
    SYNC.applyingRemote = false;
  }
}
function connectSync(pin, opts){
  opts = opts || {};
  pin = String(pin).trim();
  if(!/^\d{6}$/.test(pin)){ syncSetStatus('PIN must be exactly 6 digits.'); return; }
  try{ if(SYNC.evtSource) SYNC.evtSource.close(); }catch(e){}
  SYNC.pin = pin;
  SYNC.connected = true;
  localStorage.setItem(SYNC_PIN_KEY, pin);
  syncSetStatus('Connecting…');
  const es = new EventSource('https://ntfy.sh/'+syncTopic(pin)+'/sse');
  SYNC.evtSource = es;
  es.onopen = ()=>{ syncSetStatus('Connected. Listening for changes…'); };
  es.onmessage = (e)=>{
    try{
      const evt = JSON.parse(e.data);
      if(evt && evt.event==='message' && evt.message){
        const payload = JSON.parse(evt.message);
        applyRemoteSnapshot(payload);
      }
    }catch(err){ /* ignore malformed / keepalive messages */ }
  };
  es.onerror = ()=>{
    if(SYNC.connected) syncSetStatus('Connection interrupted — retrying…');
  };
  // If nothing arrives shortly, assume we're first to connect and seed the channel.
  clearTimeout(SYNC.seedTimer);
  SYNC.seedTimer = setTimeout(()=>{ if(SYNC.connected) pushToCloud(); }, 2500);
}
function disconnectSync(){
  try{ if(SYNC.evtSource) SYNC.evtSource.close(); }catch(e){}
  clearTimeout(SYNC.seedTimer); clearTimeout(SYNC.pushTimer);
  SYNC.connected = false; SYNC.evtSource = null;
  localStorage.removeItem(SYNC_PIN_KEY);
  syncSetStatus('Disconnected');
}
function tryAutoConnectSync(){
  const pin = localStorage.getItem(SYNC_PIN_KEY);
  if(pin) connectSync(pin, {silent:true});
}
function randomPin(){
  return String(Math.floor(100000 + Math.random()*900000));
}

/* ---------- helpers ---------- */
function uid(){ return 'x'+Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,8); }
function dateKey(d){ const y=d.getFullYear(),m=String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'),day=String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0'); return `${y}-${m}-${day}`; }
function parseKey(k){ const [y,m,d]=k.split('-').map(Number); return new Date(y,m-1,d); }
function fmtMoney(n){ const s = n<0?'-':'+'; const v = Math.abs(n).toLocaleString(undefined,{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2}); return (n===0?'':s)+(STATE.settings.currency||'$')+v; }
function fmtMoneyPlain(n){ return (STATE.settings.currency||'$')+Math.abs(n).toLocaleString(undefined,{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2}); }
function confirmDelete(msg, cb){
  if(STATE.settings.confirmDelete===false){ cb(); return; }
  if(confirm(msg)) cb();
}
function fmtShortDate(k){ const d=parseKey(k); return d.toLocaleDateString(undefined,{month:'short',day:'numeric',year:'numeric'}); }
function escapeHtml(s){ const d=document.createElement('div'); d.textContent = s==null?'':String(s); return d.innerHTML; }
function resultOf(t){ return t.pnl>0?'Win':t.pnl<0?'Loss':'Breakeven'; }
function sortedTrades(){ return [...STATE.trades].sort((a,b)=> a.date===b.date ? (a.time||'').localeCompare(b.time||'') : (a.date<b.date?1:-1)); }
function sortedJournal(){ return [...STATE.journal].sort((a,b)=> a.date<b.date?1:-1); }

function normalizeSymbol(asset){
  return String(asset||'').trim().toUpperCase().replace(/^\//,'').match(/^[A-Z0-9]+/)?.[0] || '';
}
function futuresSpec(asset){
  const sym = normalizeSymbol(asset);
  if(FUTURES_SPECS[sym]) return FUTURES_SPECS[sym];
  const root = Object.keys(FUTURES_SPECS).sort((a,b)=>b.length-a.length).find(k=>sym.startsWith(k));
  return root ? FUTURES_SPECS[root] : null;
}
function calcTradePnl({asset,direction,entry,exit,size}){
  entry = Number(entry); exit = Number(exit); size = Number(size);
  if(!isFinite(entry) || !isFinite(exit) || !isFinite(size) || size<=0) return null;
  const dirMult = direction==='Short' ? -1 : 1;
  const priceMove = (exit - entry) * dirMult;
  const spec = futuresSpec(asset);
  if(spec){
    const ticksMoved = priceMove / spec.tickSize;
    const pnl = ticksMoved * spec.tickValue * size;
    return {pnl, spec, priceMove, ticksMoved};
  }
  return {pnl: priceMove * size, spec:null, priceMove, ticksMoved:null};
}

/* ---------- Nav config ---------- */
const PAGES = [
  {id:'tips', label:'Tips', ic:'i'},
  {id:'reviews', label:'Weekly Reviews', ic:'W'},
  {id:'dashboard', label:'Dashboard', ic:'👻'},
  {id:'journal', label:'Journal', ic:'📓'},
  {id:'trades', label:'Trades', ic:'📊'},
  {id:'propaccounts', label:'Prop Accounts', ic:'🏦'},
  {id:'calendar', label:'Calendar', ic:'📅'},
  {id:'analytics', label:'Analytics', ic:'📈'},
  {id:'performance', label:'Performance', ic:'🏁'},
  {id:'goals', label:'Goals', ic:'🎯'},
  {id:'notes', label:'Notes', ic:'🗒️'},
  {id:'assets', label:'Assets', ic:'💠'},
  {id:'tags', label:'Tags', ic:'🏷️'},
  {id:'settings', label:'Settings', ic:'⚙️'},
  {id:'backup', label:'Backup & Export', ic:'⤓'},
  {id:'sync', label:'Device Sync', ic:'🔄'},
];
let currentPage = 'dashboard';

function renderNav(){
  const nav = document.getElementById('navList');
  nav.innerHTML = PAGES.map(p=>`<button class="nav-item ${p.id===currentPage?'active':''}" data-page="${p.id}"><span class="ic">${p.ic}</span>${p.label}</button>`).join('');
  nav.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{ goTo(btn.dataset.page); document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.remove('open'); });
  });
}
function goTo(pageId){
  currentPage = pageId;
  document.getElementById('pageTitle').textContent = PAGES.find(p=>p.id===pageId).label;
  document.getElementById('dateRangeBtn').style.display = (pageId==='dashboard')?'flex':'none';
  renderNav();
  renderPage();
}

/* ---------- Canvas chart helpers ---------- */
function hiDpiCanvas(canvas){
  const ratio = window.devicePixelRatio||1;
  const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  canvas.width = rect.width*ratio; canvas.height = rect.height*ratio;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  ctx.setTransform(ratio,0,0,ratio,0,0);
  return {ctx, w:rect.width, h:rect.height};
}
function drawLineChart(canvas, series, opts={}){
  if(!canvas) return;
  const {ctx,w,h} = hiDpiCanvas(canvas);
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);
  const padL=opts.padL??42, padR=opts.padR??10, padT=opts.padT??10, padB=opts.padB??22;
  const plotW=w-padL-padR, plotH=h-padT-padB;
  let allVals=[]; series.forEach(s=>s.data.forEach(v=>allVals.push(v)));
  let min=Math.min(...allVals), max=Math.max(...allVals);
  if(min===max){ min-=1; max+=1; }
  const pad=(max-min)*0.08; min-=pad; max+=pad;
  const n = series[0].data.length;
  function X(i){ return padL + (n<=1?0:i/(n-1))*plotW; }
  function Y(v){ return padT + (1-(v-min)/(max-min))*plotH; }
  // grid
  ctx.strokeStyle = opts.gridColor || 'rgba(150,150,180,.12)';
  ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.font='11px var(--sans)'; ctx.fillStyle = opts.textColor || '#7d7d92';
  const steps=4;
  for(let i=0;i<=steps;i++){
    const v = min + (max-min)*i/steps;
    const y = Y(v);
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(padL,y); ctx.lineTo(w-padR,y); ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillText(opts.yFmt?opts.yFmt(v):Math.round(v), 2, y+3);
  }
  // x labels
  if(opts.xLabels){
    ctx.textAlign='center';
    opts.xLabels.forEach((lab,i)=>{ if(i%opts.xSkip!==0 && i!==n-1) return; ctx.fillText(lab, X(i), h-4); });
    ctx.textAlign='left';
  }
  // series
  series.forEach(s=>{
    if(s.fill){
      const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0,padT,0,padT+plotH);
      grad.addColorStop(0, s.color+'55'); grad.addColorStop(1, s.color+'00');
      ctx.beginPath();
      s.data.forEach((v,i)=>{ const x=X(i),y=Y(v); i===0?ctx.moveTo(x,y):ctx.lineTo(x,y); });
      ctx.lineTo(X(n-1), padT+plotH); ctx.lineTo(X(0), padT+plotH); ctx.closePath();
      ctx.fillStyle=grad; ctx.fill();
    }
    ctx.beginPath();
    s.data.forEach((v,i)=>{ const x=X(i),y=Y(v); i===0?ctx.moveTo(x,y):ctx.lineTo(x,y); });
    ctx.strokeStyle = s.color; ctx.lineWidth = s.width||2.5; ctx.lineJoin='round'; ctx.lineCap='round';
    if(s.dashed) ctx.setLineDash([4,4]); else ctx.setLineDash([]);
    ctx.stroke();
    if(s.dot){
      const x=X(n-1), y=Y(s.data[n-1]);
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(x,y,4,0,7); ctx.fillStyle=s.color; ctx.shadowColor=s.color; ctx.shadowBlur=8; ctx.fill(); ctx.shadowBlur=0;
    }
  });
  ctx.setLineDash([]);
}
function drawBarChart(canvas, values, opts={}){
  if(!canvas) return;
  const {ctx,w,h} = hiDpiCanvas(canvas);
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);
  const padL=opts.padL??34, padR=opts.padR??8, padT=opts.padT??10, padB=opts.padB??20;
  const plotW=w-padL-padR, plotH=h-padT-padB;
  const min = Math.min(0, ...values), max = Math.max(0, ...values.map(v=>v));
  const range = (max-min)||1;
  function Y(v){ return padT + (1-(v-min)/range)*plotH; }
  const zeroY = Y(0);
  ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(150,150,180,.15)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(padL,zeroY); ctx.lineTo(w-padR,zeroY); ctx.stroke();
  const n=values.length; const bw = plotW/n*0.62;
  ctx.font='10px var(--sans)'; ctx.fillStyle='#7d7d92';
  values.forEach((v,i)=>{
    const cx = padL + (i+0.5)/n*plotW;
    const y = Y(v);
    ctx.fillStyle = v>=0 ? (opts.posColor||'#22c55e') : (opts.negColor||'#f43f5e');
    const top = Math.min(y, zeroY), hgt = Math.abs(y-zeroY);
    roundRectPath(ctx, cx-bw/2, top, bw, Math.max(hgt,1.5), 3);
    ctx.fill();
  });
  if(opts.xLabels){
    ctx.fillStyle='#7d7d92'; ctx.textAlign='center';
    opts.xLabels.forEach((lab,i)=>{ if(opts.xSkip && i%opts.xSkip!==0) return; ctx.fillText(lab, padL+(i+0.5)/n*plotW, h-4); });
    ctx.textAlign='left';
  }
}
function roundRectPath(ctx,x,y,w,h,r){
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(x+r,y);
  ctx.arcTo(x+w,y,x+w,y+h,r);
  ctx.arcTo(x+w,y+h,x,y+h,r);
  ctx.arcTo(x,y+h,x,y,r);
  ctx.arcTo(x,y,x+w,y,r);
  ctx.closePath();
}
function drawDonut(canvas, segments){
  const {ctx,w,h} = hiDpiCanvas(canvas);
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);
  const cx=w/2, cy=h/2, r=Math.min(w,h)/2-6, lw=Math.max(10,r*0.32);
  let start=-Math.PI/2;
  const total = segments.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.value,0)||1;
  segments.forEach(seg=>{
    const angle = seg.value/total*Math.PI*2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx,cy,r,start,start+angle);
    ctx.strokeStyle=seg.color; ctx.lineWidth=lw; ctx.lineCap='butt'; ctx.stroke();
    start+=angle;
  });
}

/* ---------- Aggregations ---------- */
function computeStats(trades){
  const wins = trades.filter(t=>t.pnl>0), losses = trades.filter(t=>t.pnl<0), be = trades.filter(t=>t.pnl===0);
  const net = trades.reduce((a,t)=>a+t.pnl,0);
  const grossWin = wins.reduce((a,t)=>a+t.pnl,0), grossLoss = Math.abs(losses.reduce((a,t)=>a+t.pnl,0));
  const winRate = trades.length? wins.length/trades.length*100 : 0;
  const avgWin = wins.length? grossWin/wins.length : 0;
  const avgLoss = losses.length? -grossLoss/losses.length : 0;
  const largestWin = wins.length? Math.max(...wins.map(t=>t.pnl)) : 0;
  const largestLoss = losses.length? Math.min(...losses.map(t=>t.pnl)) : 0;
  const profitFactor = grossLoss>0 ? +(grossWin/grossLoss).toFixed(2) : (grossWin>0?Infinity:0);
  // streaks
  let curWin=0,maxWin=0,curLoss=0,maxLoss=0;
  sortedByDateAsc(trades).forEach(t=>{
    if(t.pnl>0){ curWin++; curLoss=0; maxWin=Math.max(maxWin,curWin); }
    else if(t.pnl<0){ curLoss++; curWin=0; maxLoss=Math.max(maxLoss,curLoss); }
    else { curWin=0; curLoss=0; }
  });
  const expectancy = trades.length ? (winRate/100*avgWin + (1-winRate/100)*avgLoss) : 0;
  return {net,wins:wins.length,losses:losses.length,be:be.length,winRate,avgWin,avgLoss,largestWin,largestLoss,profitFactor,maxWin,maxLoss,expectancy,total:trades.length};
}
function sortedByDateAsc(trades){ return [...trades].sort((a,b)=> a.date===b.date?(a.time||'').localeCompare(b.time||''):(a.date<b.date?-1:1)); }
function lastNDaysTrades(n){
  const cutoff = new Date(); cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate()-n);
  const ck = dateKey(cutoff);
  return STATE.trades.filter(t=>t.date>=ck);
}
let dashRangeDays = 7;
let dashOffset = 0; // 0 = current window, 1 = one window back, etc.
function windowTrades(days, offset){
  const end = new Date(); end.setDate(end.getDate() - offset*days);
  const start = new Date(end); start.setDate(start.getDate() - days);
  const startK = dateKey(start), endK = dateKey(end);
  return STATE.trades.filter(t=> t.date > startK && t.date <= endK);
}
function windowLabel(days, offset){
  const end = new Date(); end.setDate(end.getDate() - offset*days);
  const start = new Date(end); start.setDate(start.getDate() - days + 1);
  const fmt = d=>d.toLocaleDateString(undefined,{month:'short',day:'numeric'});
  return offset===0 ? `Last ${days} Days` : `${fmt(start)} – ${fmt(end)}`;
}
function equitySeries(trades, startBalance){
  const asc = sortedByDateAsc(trades);
  let bal = startBalance; const out=[bal]; const labels=['Start'];
  asc.forEach(t=>{ bal+=t.pnl; out.push(bal); labels.push(fmtShortDate(t.date).slice(0,6)); });
  return {values:out, labels};
}
function benchmarkSeries(len, startBalance){
  // simple synthetic smoother benchmark for visual comparison
  const out=[]; let v=startBalance;
  for(let i=0;i<len;i++){ v += startBalance*0.0009*(1+Math.sin(i/2)*0.3); out.push(v); }
  return out;
}

/* ---------- Router ---------- */
function renderPage(){
  const c = document.getElementById('content');
  const fns = {
    dashboard:renderDashboardPage, journal:renderJournalPage, trades:renderTradesPage,
    propaccounts:renderPropAccountsPage,
    tips:renderTipsPage, reviews:renderReviewsPage,
    calendar:renderCalendarPage, analytics:renderAnalyticsPage, performance:renderPerformancePage,
    goals:renderGoalsPage, notes:renderNotesPage, assets:renderAssetsPage, tags:renderTagsPage,
    settings:renderSettingsPage, backup:renderBackupPage, sync:renderSyncPage
  };
  c.innerHTML = `<div class="page active" id="pg-${currentPage}"></div>`;
  (fns[currentPage]||renderDashboardPage)(document.getElementById('pg-'+currentPage));
}

/* ---------- Dashboard ---------- */
function renderDashboardPage(root){
  const trades7 = windowTrades(dashRangeDays, dashOffset);
  const prev7 = windowTrades(dashRangeDays, dashOffset+1);
  const s = computeStats(trades7), sp = computeStats(prev7);
  const startBal = STATE.settings.startingBalance||100000;
  const eq = equitySeries(trades7, startBal);
  const bench = benchmarkSeries(eq.values.length, startBal);
  const deltaWin = s.winRate - sp.winRate;
  const deltaPF = (isFinite(s.profitFactor)?s.profitFactor:0) - (isFinite(sp.profitFactor)?sp.profitFactor:0);
  const deltaTotal = s.total - sp.total;
  const deltaNet = sp.net!==0 ? ((s.net-sp.net)/Math.abs(sp.net)*100) : 100;

  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="grid g-stats" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
    ${statCard('Net P&L', fmtMoney(s.net), 'money', deltaNet, s.net>=0, null, `vs prior ${dashRangeDays} days`)}
    ${statCard('Win Rate', s.winRate.toFixed(2)+'%', 'ring', deltaWin, deltaWin>=0, s.winRate, `vs prior ${dashRangeDays} days`)}
    ${statCard('Total Trades', String(s.total), 'bars', deltaTotal, deltaTotal>=0, null, `vs prior ${dashRangeDays} days`)}
    ${statCard('Profit Factor', isFinite(s.profitFactor)?s.profitFactor.toFixed(2):'∞', 'line', deltaPF, deltaPF>=0, null, `vs prior ${dashRangeDays} days`)}
  </div>
  <div class="grid g-2col" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-head">
        <div><div class="card-title">Equity Curve</div><div class="card-sub">Account balance vs benchmark</div></div>
        <select class="select-mini" id="eqRange"><option value="7" ${dashRangeDays===7?'selected':''}>7 Days</option><option value="30" ${dashRangeDays===30?'selected':''}>30 Days</option><option value="90" ${dashRangeDays===90?'selected':''}>90 Days</option></select>
      </div>
      <div class="chart-legend" style="margin-bottom:8px;"><span><span class="legend-dot" style="background:var(--purple)"></span>Account Balance</span><span><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#6b7280"></span>S&P 500 (Benchmark)</span></div>
      <canvas id="eqCanvas" style="width:100%;height:220px;"></canvas>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;">
      <div>
        <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:10px;">Performance Overview</div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;">
          <canvas id="perfDonut" style="width:100px;height:100px;flex:0 0 100px;"></canvas>
          <div style="font-size:12.5px;flex:1;">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px;"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:var(--green)"></span>Win &nbsp;<b class="num">${s.total?((s.wins/s.total)*100).toFixed(2):'0.00'}%</b> (${s.wins})</div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px;"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:var(--red)"></span>Loss &nbsp;<b class="num">${s.total?((s.losses/s.total)*100).toFixed(2):'0.00'}%</b> (${s.losses})</div>
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;"><span class="legend-dot" style="background:var(--gray)"></span>Breakeven &nbsp;<b class="num">${s.total?((s.be/s.total)*100).toFixed(2):'0.00'}%</b> (${s.be})</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border-soft);padding-top:14px;">
        <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:10px;">Average Win / Loss</div>
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;">
          <div><div class="num" style="font-size:19px;font-weight:800;color:var(--green)">${fmtMoneyPlain(s.avgWin)}</div><div class="card-sub">Average Win</div></div>
          <div style="text-align:right;"><div class="num" style="font-size:19px;font-weight:800;color:var(--red)">-${fmtMoneyPlain(s.avgLoss)}</div><div class="card-sub">Average Loss</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="grid g-2col" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-head"><div class="card-title">Recent Trades</div><button class="link-mini" data-goto="trades">View All</button></div>
      ${tradesTable(sortedTrades().slice(0,5))}
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-head"><div class="card-title">Monthly Performance</div><select class="select-mini" id="monthRange"><option value="month" ${monthRangeMode==='month'?'selected':''}>This Month</option><option value="3months" ${monthRangeMode==='3months'?'selected':''}>Last 3 Months</option></select></div>
      <canvas id="monthCanvas" style="width:100%;height:180px;"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="grid g-2col" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:6px;">Trading Stats</div>
      <div class="stats-list">
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Total Net P&L</span><span class="v num ${s.net>=0?'pnl-pos':'pnl-neg'}">${fmtMoney(s.net)}</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Largest Win</span><span class="v num pnl-pos">${fmtMoney(s.largestWin)}</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Total Winning Trades</span><span class="v">${s.wins}</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Largest Loss</span><span class="v num pnl-neg">${fmtMoney(s.largestLoss)}</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Total Losing Trades</span><span class="v">${s.losses}</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Max Consecutive Wins</span><span class="v">${s.maxWin}</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Total Breakeven Trades</span><span class="v">${s.be}</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Max Consecutive Losses</span><span class="v">${s.maxLoss}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-head"><div class="card-title">P&L Distribution</div><select class="select-mini" id="distRange"><option value="all" ${distRangeMode==='all'?'selected':''}>All Time</option><option value="month" ${distRangeMode==='month'?'selected':''}>This Month</option></select></div>
      <canvas id="distCanvas" style="width:100%;height:180px;"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="grid g-2col">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-head"><div class="card-title">Journal Entries</div><button class="link-mini" data-goto="journal">View All</button></div>
      ${journalList(sortedJournal().slice(0,2))}
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-head"><div class="card-title">Calendar</div><button class="link-mini" data-goto="calendar">View All</button></div>
      ${miniCalendar()}
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="footbar">
    <div class="l"><span class="dot"></span><span id="savedIndicator">Auto-saved just now</span></div>
    <div class="l"><span class="dot"></span>All systems operational</div>
  </div>
  `;
  root.querySelectorAll('[data-goto]').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>goTo(b.dataset.goto)));
  wireTradeRowClicks(root);
  drawLineChart(document.getElementById('eqCanvas'), [
    {data:bench, color:'#6b7280', width:2, dashed:true},
    {data:eq.values, color:getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--purple').trim()||'#a855f7', width:2.5, fill:true, dot:true},
  ], {xLabels:eq.labels, xSkip:Math.max(1,Math.floor(eq.labels.length/6)), yFmt:v=>'$'+Math.round(v/1000)+'K'});
  drawDonut(document.getElementById('perfDonut'), [
    {value:s.wins,color:'#22c55e'},{value:s.losses,color:'#f43f5e'},{value:s.be,color:'#7a7a90'}
  ]);
  const monthly = monthlyBuckets();
  drawBarChart(document.getElementById('monthCanvas'), monthly.values, {xLabels:monthly.labels, xSkip:Math.ceil(monthly.labels.length/5)});
  const dist = distributionBuckets();
  drawBarChart(document.getElementById('distCanvas'), dist.values, {xLabels:dist.labels, xSkip:Math.ceil(dist.labels.length/6), posColor:'#a855f7', negColor:'#7c3aed'});

  document.getElementById('eqRange').addEventListener('change', e=>{ dashRangeDays = parseInt(e.target.value,10); dashOffset = 0; renderPage(); });
  document.getElementById('monthRange').addEventListener('change', e=>{ monthRangeMode = e.target.value; renderPage(); });
  document.getElementById('distRange').addEventListener('change', e=>{ distRangeMode = e.target.value; renderPage(); });
  document.getElementById('drLabel').textContent = windowLabel(dashRangeDays, dashOffset);
  document.getElementById('drNext').disabled = dashOffset===0;
  document.getElementById('drNext').style.opacity = dashOffset===0 ? .35 : 1;
  document.getElementById('drNext').style.cursor = dashOffset===0 ? 'default' : 'pointer';
}
function statCard(label,value,type,delta,positive,ring,cmpLabel){
  const deltaTxt = (isFinite(delta)? (delta>=0?'▲ ':'▼ ')+Math.abs(delta).toFixed(2)+(type==='money'||type==='ring'?'%':'') : '');
  return `<div class="card stat-card">
    <div class="stat-label">${label}</div>
    <div class="stat-value ${label==='Net P&L'?(value.startsWith('-')?'pnl-neg':'pnl-pos'):''} num">${value}</div>
    <div class="stat-delta ${positive?'up':'down'}">${deltaTxt} <span style="color:var(--text-faint);font-weight:600;">${cmpLabel||'vs prior period'}</span></div>
  </div>`;
}
function tradesTable(trades){
  if(!trades.length) return emptyState('No trades yet', 'Log your first trade to see it here.');
  return `<table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Asset</th><th>Direction</th><th>Result</th><th>P&L</th></tr></thead><tbody>
  ${trades.map(t=>`<tr data-id="${t.id}"><td>${fmtShortDate(t.date)}</td><td>${escapeHtml(t.asset)}</td><td><span class="badge ${t.direction==='Long'?'long':'short'}">${t.direction}</span></td><td><span class="badge ${t.pnl>0?'win':t.pnl<0?'loss':'be'}">${resultOf(t)}</span></td><td class="num ${t.pnl>=0?'pnl-pos':'pnl-neg'}">${fmtMoney(t.pnl)}</td></tr>`).join('')}
  </tbody></table>`;
}
function wireTradeRowClicks(root){
  root.querySelectorAll('tr[data-id]').forEach(tr=>tr.addEventListener('click',()=>openTradeModal(tr.dataset.id)));
}
function journalList(list){
  if(!list.length) return emptyState('No journal entries', 'Write your first reflection.');
  return list.map(j=>`<div class="journal-item">
    <div class="j-date">${parseKey(j.date).getDate()}</div>
    <div class="j-body">
      <div class="j-date-label">${fmtShortDate(j.date)}</div>
      <div class="j-text">${escapeHtml(j.text)}</div>
      <div class="j-tags">${j.tags.map(t=>`<span class="tagchip">${escapeHtml(t)}</span>`).join('')}</div>
    </div>
  </div>`).join('');
}
function miniCalendar(){
  const now = new Date();
  const y=now.getFullYear(), m=now.getMonth();
  const first = new Date(y,m,1);
  const mon = STATE.settings.weekStart==='mon';
  const startDow = mon ? (first.getDay()+6)%7 : first.getDay();
  const daysInMonth = new Date(y,m+1,0).getDate();
  const todayK = dateKey(now);
  const pnlByDay = {};
  STATE.trades.forEach(t=>{ pnlByDay[t.date]=(pnlByDay[t.date]||0)+t.pnl; });
  let cells=[];
  for(let i=0;i<startDow;i++) cells.push('<td></td>');
  for(let d=1; d<=daysInMonth; d++){
    const k = dateKey(new Date(y,m,d));
    let cls='day'; if(k===todayK) cls+=' today'; else if(pnlByDay[k]>0) cls+=' win'; else if(pnlByDay[k]<0) cls+=' loss';
    cells.push(`<td><div class="${cls}" data-day="${k}">${d}</div></td>`);
  }
  while(cells.length%7!==0) cells.push('<td></td>');
  let rows=''; for(let i=0;i<cells.length;i+=7) rows+=`<tr>${cells.slice(i,i+7).join('')}</tr>`;
  const heads = mon ? ['M','T','W','T','F','S','S'] : ['S','M','T','W','T','F','S'];
  return `<table class="mini-cal"><thead><tr>${heads.map(h=>`<th>${h}</th>`).join('')}</tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`;
}
function emptyState(title, sub){
  return `<div class="empty-state"><img src="${GHOST_ICON}" alt=""><div class="t">${title}</div><div>${sub}</div></div>`;
}
let monthRangeMode = 'month'; // 'month' | '3months'
let distRangeMode = 'all'; // 'all' | 'month'
function monthlyBuckets(mode){
  mode = mode || monthRangeMode;
  const now=new Date();
  if(mode==='3months'){
    const labels=[]; const values=[];
    for(let back=2; back>=0; back--){
      const d = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth()-back, 1);
      labels.push(d.toLocaleDateString(undefined,{month:'short'}));
      const y=d.getFullYear(), m=d.getMonth();
      const sum = STATE.trades.filter(t=>{ const dt=parseKey(t.date); return dt.getFullYear()===y && dt.getMonth()===m; }).reduce((a,t)=>a+t.pnl,0);
      values.push(sum);
    }
    return {values, labels};
  }
  const y=now.getFullYear(), m=now.getMonth();
  const days = new Date(y,m+1,0).getDate();
  const values = new Array(days).fill(0); const labels=[];
  for(let d=1; d<=days; d++) labels.push(String(d));
  STATE.trades.forEach(t=>{ const dt=parseKey(t.date); if(dt.getFullYear()===y && dt.getMonth()===m){ values[dt.getDate()-1]+=t.pnl; } });
  return {values, labels};
}
function distributionBuckets(mode){
  mode = mode || distRangeMode;
  const now = new Date();
  const source = mode==='month' ? STATE.trades.filter(t=>{ const dt=parseKey(t.date); return dt.getFullYear()===now.getFullYear() && dt.getMonth()===now.getMonth(); }) : STATE.trades;
  const buckets = [-1500,-1000,-500,0,500,1000,1500,2000];
  const labels = ['-$1.5K','-$1K','-$500','$0','$500','$1K','$1.5K','$2K+'];
  const values = new Array(buckets.length).fill(0);
  source.forEach(t=>{
    let idx = buckets.findIndex((b,i)=> t.pnl < (buckets[i+1]??Infinity));
    if(idx<0) idx = buckets.length-1;
    values[idx]++;
  });
  return {values, labels};
}

/* ---------- Journal Page ---------- */
function renderJournalPage(root){
  const list = sortedJournal();
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="card-head" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
    <input class="search-input" id="journalSearch" placeholder="Search journal entries…">
    <button class="btn-primary" id="addJournalBtn">＋ New Entry</button>
  </div>
  <div class="card" id="journalListWrap">${list.length? list.map(journalEntryFull).join('') : emptyState('No journal entries yet','Start reflecting on your trading day.')}</div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('addJournalBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>openJournalModal());
  document.getElementById('journalSearch').addEventListener('input', e=>{
    const q = e.target.value.toLowerCase();
    const filtered = list.filter(j=> j.text.toLowerCase().includes(q) || j.tags.some(t=>t.toLowerCase().includes(q)));
    document.getElementById('journalListWrap').innerHTML = filtered.length? filtered.map(journalEntryFull).join('') : emptyState('No matches','Try a different search term.');
    wireJournalActions(root);
  });
  wireJournalActions(root);
}
function journalEntryFull(j){
  return `<div class="journal-item" data-id="${j.id}">
    <div class="j-date">${j.mood||'📝'}</div>
    <div class="j-body">
      <div class="j-date-label">${fmtShortDate(j.date)}</div>
      <div class="j-text">${escapeHtml(j.text)}</div>
      <div class="j-tags">${j.tags.map(t=>`<span class="tagchip">${escapeHtml(t)}</span>`).join('')}</div>
      ${j.screenshot?`<img src="${j.screenshot}" style="max-width:220px;border-radius:8px;margin-top:8px;display:block;">`:''}
    </div>
    <div class="r" style="display:flex;gap:4px;">
      <button class="icon-sm editJ" title="Edit">✏️</button>
      <button class="icon-sm delJ" title="Delete">🗑️</button>
    </div>
  </div>`;
}
function wireJournalActions(root){
  root.querySelectorAll('.editJ').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    const id = e.target.closest('[data-id]').dataset.id; openJournalModal(STATE.journal.find(j=>j.id===id));
  }));
  root.querySelectorAll('.delJ').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    const id = e.target.closest('[data-id]').dataset.id;
    confirmDelete('Delete this journal entry?', ()=>{ STATE.journal = STATE.journal.filter(j=>j.id!==id); persist(); renderPage(); });
  }));
}
function openJournalModal(existing){
  const moods = ['😄','🙂','😐','😤','😢'];
  const bodyTags = STATE.tags.map(t=>t.name);
  showModal(existing?'Edit Entry':'New Journal Entry', `
    <div class="field"><label>Date</label><input type="date" id="jDate" value="${existing?existing.date:dateKey(new Date())}"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Mood</label><div class="mood-picker" id="jMood">${moods.map(m=>`<div class="mood-opt ${existing&&existing.mood===m?'sel':''}" data-m="${m}">${m}</div>`).join('')}</div></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Reflection</label><textarea id="jText" placeholder="What happened today? What did you learn?">${existing?escapeHtml(existing.text):''}</textarea></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Tags</label><div class="chip-picker" id="jTags">${bodyTags.map(t=>`<div class="chip-opt ${existing&&existing.tags.includes(t)?'sel':''}" data-tag="${escapeHtml(t)}">${escapeHtml(t)}</div>`).join('')}</div></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Screenshot (optional)</label><div class="file-drop" id="jDrop">Click to upload an image${existing&&existing.screenshot?`<br><img src="${existing.screenshot}">`:''}</div><input type="file" id="jFile" accept="image/*" style="display:none;"></div>
  `, ()=>{
    const date = document.getElementById('jDate').value || dateKey(new Date());
    const text = document.getElementById('jText').value.trim();
    const mood = document.querySelector('#jMood .mood-opt.sel')?.dataset.m || '📝';
    const tags = [...document.querySelectorAll('#jTags .chip-opt.sel')].map(e=>e.dataset.tag);
    if(!text) return alert('Please write a reflection before saving.');
    const screenshot = window.__jScreenshot;
    if(existing){ Object.assign(existing, {date,text,mood,tags, screenshot: screenshot!==undefined?screenshot:existing.screenshot}); }
    else STATE.journal.push({id:uid(), date, text, mood, tags, screenshot: screenshot||null});
    window.__jScreenshot = undefined;
    persist(); closeModal(); renderPage();
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('#jMood .mood-opt').forEach(o=>o.addEventListener('click',()=>{ document.querySelectorAll('#jMood .mood-opt').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('sel')); o.classList.add('sel'); }));
  document.querySelectorAll('#jTags .chip-opt').forEach(o=>o.addEventListener('click',()=>o.classList.toggle('sel')));
  document.getElementById('jDrop').addEventListener('click',()=>document.getElementById('jFile').click());
  document.getElementById('jFile').addEventListener('change', e=>{
    const file = e.target.files[0]; if(!file) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = ()=>{ window.__jScreenshot = reader.result; document.getElementById('jDrop').innerHTML = `Image selected<br><img src="${reader.result}">`; };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
}

/* ---------- Trades Page ---------- */
function renderTradesPage(root){
  const trades = sortedTrades();
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="card-head" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
    <input class="search-input" id="tradeSearch" placeholder="Search by asset, setup, session…">
    <button class="btn-primary" id="addTradeBtn2">＋ New Trade</button>
  </div>
  <div class="card"><div id="tradesTableWrap">${tradesFullTable(trades)}</div></div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('addTradeBtn2').addEventListener('click', ()=>openTradeModal());
  document.getElementById('tradeSearch').addEventListener('input', e=>{
    const q = e.target.value.toLowerCase();
    const filtered = trades.filter(t=> [t.asset,t.setup,t.session,...(t.tags||[])].join(' ').toLowerCase().includes(q));
    document.getElementById('tradesTableWrap').innerHTML = tradesFullTable(filtered);
    wireTradeRowClicks(root);
  });
  wireTradeRowClicks(root);
}
function tradesFullTable(trades){
  if(!trades.length) return emptyState('No trades logged', 'Click "New Trade" to log your first one.');
  return `<table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>Asset</th><th>Dir</th><th>Entry</th><th>Exit</th><th>R:R</th><th>Setup</th><th>Result</th><th>P&L</th></tr></thead><tbody>
  ${trades.map(t=>`<tr data-id="${t.id}">
    <td>${fmtShortDate(t.date)}</td><td>${escapeHtml(t.asset)}</td>
    <td><span class="badge ${t.direction==='Long'?'long':'short'}">${t.direction}</span></td>
    <td class="num">${t.entry??'—'}</td><td class="num">${t.exit??'—'}</td><td class="num">${t.rr??'—'}</td>
    <td>${escapeHtml(t.setup||'—')}</td>
    <td><span class="badge ${t.pnl>0?'win':t.pnl<0?'loss':'be'}">${resultOf(t)}</span></td>
    <td class="num ${t.pnl>=0?'pnl-pos':'pnl-neg'}">${fmtMoney(t.pnl)}</td>
  </tr>`).join('')}
  </tbody></table>`;
}
function openTradeModal(id){
  const existing = id ? STATE.trades.find(t=>t.id===id) : null;
  const directions = ['Long','Short'];
  const sessions = ['Asia','London','New York'];
  showModal(existing?'Edit Trade':'New Trade', `
    <div class="field-row"><div class="field"><label>Date</label><input type="date" id="tDate" value="${existing?existing.date:dateKey(new Date())}"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Time</label><input type="time" id="tTime" value="${existing?existing.time||'':''}"></div></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Asset</label><input list="assetList" id="tAsset" value="${existing?escapeHtml(existing.asset):''}" placeholder="e.g. EUR/USD"><datalist id="assetList">${STATE.assets.map(a=>`<option value="${escapeHtml(a.name)}">`).join('')}</datalist></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Direction</label><div class="dir-toggle" id="tDir">${directions.map(d=>`<div class="dir-btn ${d.toLowerCase()} ${((existing&&existing.direction===d)||(!existing&&d==='Long'))?'sel':''}" data-d="${d}">${d}</div>`).join('')}</div></div>
    <div class="field-row3">
      <div class="field"><label>Entry Price</label><input type="number" step="any" id="tEntry" value="${existing?existing.entry:''}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Exit Price</label><input type="number" step="any" id="tExit" value="${existing?existing.exit:''}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Size / Lots</label><input type="number" step="any" id="tSize" value="${existing?existing.size:(STATE.settings.defaultSize||1)}"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="field-row">
      <div class="field"><label>P&L ($) auto-calculated</label><input type="number" step="any" id="tPnl" value="${existing?existing.pnl:''}" readonly><div class="calc-note" id="tCalcNote">Enter asset, direction, entry, exit, and contracts.</div></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Risk:Reward</label><input type="number" step="any" id="tRR" value="${existing?existing.rr:''}"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="field-row">
      <div class="field"><label>Session</label><select id="tSession">${sessions.map(s=>`<option ${(existing?existing.session===s:s===(STATE.settings.defaultSession||'London'))?'selected':''}>${s}</option>`).join('')}</select></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Setup</label><input id="tSetup" value="${existing?escapeHtml(existing.setup||''):''}" placeholder="e.g. Breakout"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="field"><label>Tags</label><div class="chip-picker" id="tTags">${STATE.tags.map(t=>`<div class="chip-opt ${existing&&(existing.tags||[]).includes(t.name)?'sel':''}" data-tag="${escapeHtml(t.name)}">${escapeHtml(t.name)}</div>`).join('')}</div></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Notes</label><textarea id="tNotes" placeholder="Trade notes / lessons learned">${existing?escapeHtml(existing.notes||''):''}</textarea></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Screenshot (optional)</label><div class="file-drop" id="tDrop">Click to upload a chart screenshot${existing&&existing.screenshot?`<br><img src="${existing.screenshot}">`:''}</div><input type="file" id="tFile" accept="image/*" style="display:none;"></div>
    ${existing?'<button class="btn-danger" id="tDelBtn" type="button" style="margin-top:4px;">Delete Trade</button>':''}
  `, ()=>{
    const dir = document.querySelector('#tDir .dir-btn.sel')?.dataset.d || 'Long';
    const asset = document.getElementById('tAsset').value.trim();
    if(!asset) return alert('Please enter an asset.');
    const entry = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tEntry').value)||0;
    const exit = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tExit').value)||0;
    const size = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tSize').value)||1;
    const calc = calcTradePnl({asset, direction:dir, entry, exit, size});
    const manualPnl = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tPnl').value);
    let pnl = (calc && calc.spec) ? calc.pnl : (isFinite(manualPnl) ? manualPnl : (calc ? calc.pnl : 0));
    if(!isFinite(pnl)) pnl = 0;
    const data = {
      date: document.getElementById('tDate').value || dateKey(new Date()),
      time: document.getElementById('tTime').value,
      asset, direction:dir, entry, exit, size, pnl,
      rr: parseFloat(document.getElementById('tRR').value)||0,
      session: document.getElementById('tSession').value,
      setup: document.getElementById('tSetup').value.trim(),
      tags: [...document.querySelectorAll('#tTags .chip-opt.sel')].map(e=>e.dataset.tag),
      notes: document.getElementById('tNotes').value.trim(),
    };
    const shot = window.__tScreenshot;
    data.screenshot = shot!==undefined ? shot : (existing?existing.screenshot:null);
    if(existing) Object.assign(existing, data);
    else STATE.trades.push({id:uid(), ...data});
    window.__tScreenshot = undefined;
    persist(); closeModal(); renderPage();
  });
  function updateTradeCalcPreview(){
    const dir = document.querySelector('#tDir .dir-btn.sel')?.dataset.d || 'Long';
    const asset = document.getElementById('tAsset').value.trim();
    const entry = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tEntry').value);
    const exit = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tExit').value);
    const size = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tSize').value)||1;
    const calc = calcTradePnl({asset, direction:dir, entry, exit, size});
    const pnlInput = document.getElementById('tPnl');
    const note = document.getElementById('tCalcNote');
    if(!calc){
      pnlInput.value = '';
      note.textContent = 'Enter asset, direction, entry, exit, and contracts. Size must be greater than zero.';
      return;
    }
    pnlInput.value = calc.pnl.toFixed(2);
    if(calc.spec){
      note.textContent = `${normalizeSymbol(asset)}: ${calc.spec.name}. Move ${calc.priceMove.toFixed(4)} points, ${calc.ticksMoved.toFixed(2)} ticks, tick value $${calc.spec.tickValue}, point value $${calc.spec.pointValue}.`;
    } else {
      note.textContent = `No futures contract matched. Fallback formula used: price move ${calc.priceMove.toFixed(4)} x size ${size} = $${calc.pnl.toFixed(2)}.`;
    }
  }
  document.querySelectorAll('#tDir .dir-btn').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>{ document.querySelectorAll('#tDir .dir-btn').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('sel')); b.classList.add('sel'); updateTradeCalcPreview(); }));
  ['tAsset','tEntry','tExit','tSize'].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('input', updateTradeCalcPreview));
  updateTradeCalcPreview();
  document.querySelectorAll('#tTags .chip-opt').forEach(o=>o.addEventListener('click',()=>o.classList.toggle('sel')));
  document.getElementById('tDrop').addEventListener('click', ()=>document.getElementById('tFile').click());
  document.getElementById('tFile').addEventListener('change', e=>{
    const file = e.target.files[0]; if(!file) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = ()=>{ window.__tScreenshot = reader.result; document.getElementById('tDrop').innerHTML = `Image selected<br><img src="${reader.result}">`; };
    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
  });
  if(existing){
    document.getElementById('tDelBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
      confirmDelete('Delete this trade?', ()=>{ STATE.trades = STATE.trades.filter(t=>t.id!==existing.id); persist(); closeModal(); renderPage(); });
    });
  }
}

/* ---------- Prop Accounts Page ---------- */
function computePropAccount(a){
  const peak = Math.max(a.peakEquity||a.startingBalance, a.currentEquity, a.startingBalance);
  const floor = (a.maxDD>0) ? (peak - a.maxDD) : null;
  const buffer = floor!=null ? (a.currentEquity - floor) : null;
  const profitTarget = a.profitTargetPct>0 ? a.startingBalance*a.profitTargetPct/100 : 0;
  const profit = a.currentEquity - a.startingBalance;
  const profitPct = profitTarget>0 ? Math.min(100, Math.max(0,(profit/profitTarget)*100)) : 0;
  return {peak, floor, buffer, profitTarget, profit, profitPct};
}
function propStatusBadgeClass(status){
  return status==='Failed' ? 'loss' : (status==='Funded' || status==='Passed') ? 'win' : 'be';
}
function renderPropAccountsPage(root){
  const list = STATE.propAccounts||[];
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="card-head" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
    <div class="card-sub">Track evaluation and funded accounts across every prop firm you trade with.</div>
    <button class="btn-primary" id="addPropBtn">＋ New Account</button>
  </div>
  <div class="grid g-2">${list.length? list.map(propAccountCard).join('') : '<div class="card">'+emptyState('No prop accounts yet','Add your first prop firm account to start tracking drawdown and profit targets.')+'</div>'}</div>`;
  document.getElementById('addPropBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>openPropAccountModal());
  root.querySelectorAll('.editProp').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click', e=>{
    const id = e.target.closest('[data-id]').dataset.id; openPropAccountModal(STATE.propAccounts.find(a=>a.id===id));
  }));
  root.querySelectorAll('.delProp').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click', e=>{
    const id = e.target.closest('[data-id]').dataset.id;
    confirmDelete('Delete this prop account?', ()=>{ STATE.propAccounts = STATE.propAccounts.filter(a=>a.id!==id); persist(); renderPage(); });
  }));
  root.querySelectorAll('.updateEquityProp').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click', e=>{
    const id = e.target.closest('[data-id]').dataset.id; openUpdateEquityModal(STATE.propAccounts.find(a=>a.id===id));
  }));
}
function propAccountCard(a){
  const c = computePropAccount(a);
  const ddPct = (c.floor!=null && a.maxDD>0) ? Math.max(0, Math.min(100, (c.buffer/a.maxDD)*100)) : null;
  const ddLow = ddPct!=null && ddPct<25;
  return `<div class="card" data-id="${a.id}">
    <div class="card-head">
      <div>
