        <div class="card-title">${escapeHtml(a.firm)}</div>
        <div class="card-sub">${fmtMoneyPlain(a.size)} account · ${escapeHtml(a.phase)} · ${escapeHtml(a.ddType)}</div>
      </div>
      <span style="display:flex; gap:6px; align-items:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <span class="badge ${propStatusBadgeClass(a.status)}">${escapeHtml(a.status)}</span>
        <button class="icon-sm updateEquityProp" title="Update equity">💰</button>
        <button class="icon-sm editProp" title="Edit">✏️</button>
        <button class="icon-sm delProp" title="Delete">🗑️</button>
      </span>
    </div>
    <div class="stats-list">
      <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Current Equity</span><span class="v num">${fmtMoneyPlain(a.currentEquity)}</span></div>
      <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Peak Equity</span><span class="v num">${fmtMoneyPlain(c.peak)}</span></div>
      ${c.floor!=null?`<div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Drawdown Floor</span><span class="v num">${fmtMoneyPlain(c.floor)}</span></div>
      <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Buffer to Floor</span><span class="v num ${c.buffer>=0?'pnl-pos':'pnl-neg'}">${fmtMoney(c.buffer)}</span></div>`:''}
    </div>
    ${ddPct!=null?`<div class="card-sub" style="margin:10px 0 4px;">Drawdown Buffer Remaining</div>
    <div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" style="width:${ddPct}%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,${ddLow?'#f43f5e,#f43f5e':'var(--purple-2),var(--purple)'});"></div></div>`:''}
    ${c.profitTarget>0?`<div class="card-sub" style="margin:10px 0 4px;">Profit Target Progress</div>
    <div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" style="width:${c.profitPct}%;"></div></div>
    <div class="goal-meta">${fmtMoney(c.profit)} of ${fmtMoneyPlain(c.profitTarget)} target · ${c.profitPct.toFixed(0)}%</div>`:''}
    ${a.notes?`<div class="card-sub" style="margin-top:10px; white-space:pre-wrap;">${escapeHtml(a.notes)}</div>`:''}
  </div>`;
}
function openPropAccountModal(existing){
  showModal(existing?'Edit Prop Account':'New Prop Account', `
    <div class="field"><label>Prop Firm</label><input id="paFirm" value="${existing?escapeHtml(existing.firm):''}" placeholder="e.g. FTMO, Apex, The5ers"></div>
    <div class="field-row">
      <div class="field"><label>Account Size</label><input type="number" step="any" id="paSize" value="${existing?existing.size:100000}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Phase</label>
        <select id="paPhase">
          ${['Phase 1','Phase 2','Funded','Instant Funded'].map(p=>`<option value="${p}" ${existing&&existing.phase===p?'selected':''}>${p}</option>`).join('')}
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field-row">
      <div class="field"><label>Drawdown Type</label>
        <select id="paDDType">
          ${['Static','EOD Trailing','Intraday Trailing'].map(p=>`<option value="${p}" ${existing&&existing.ddType===p?'selected':''}>${p}</option>`).join('')}
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="field"><label>Status</label>
        <select id="paStatus">
          ${['Active','Passed','Funded','Failed'].map(p=>`<option value="${p}" ${existing&&existing.status===p?'selected':''}>${p}</option>`).join('')}
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field-row">
      <div class="field"><label>Starting Balance</label><input type="number" step="any" id="paStart" value="${existing?existing.startingBalance:100000}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Current Equity</label><input type="number" step="any" id="paEquity" value="${existing?existing.currentEquity:100000}"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="field-row">
      <div class="field"><label>Max Drawdown ($)</label><input type="number" step="any" id="paMaxDD" value="${existing?existing.maxDD:5000}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Daily Drawdown ($, optional)</label><input type="number" step="any" id="paDailyDD" value="${existing&&existing.dailyDD?existing.dailyDD:0}"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="field"><label>Profit Target (%, use 0 if funded / no target)</label><input type="number" step="any" id="paTarget" value="${existing?existing.profitTargetPct:10}"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Notes</label><textarea id="paNotes" placeholder="Rules, reminders, payout notes…">${existing?escapeHtml(existing.notes||''):''}</textarea></div>
  `, ()=>{
    const firm = document.getElementById('paFirm').value.trim();
    if(!firm) return alert('Please enter the prop firm name.');
    const startingBalance = parseFloat(document.getElementById('paStart').value)||0;
    const currentEquity = parseFloat(document.getElementById('paEquity').value)||startingBalance;
    const data = {
      firm,
      size: parseFloat(document.getElementById('paSize').value)||0,
      phase: document.getElementById('paPhase').value,
      ddType: document.getElementById('paDDType').value,
      status: document.getElementById('paStatus').value,
      startingBalance,
      currentEquity,
      maxDD: parseFloat(document.getElementById('paMaxDD').value)||0,
      dailyDD: parseFloat(document.getElementById('paDailyDD').value)||0,
      profitTargetPct: parseFloat(document.getElementById('paTarget').value)||0,
      notes: document.getElementById('paNotes').value.trim()
    };
    if(existing){
      data.peakEquity = Math.max(existing.peakEquity||startingBalance, currentEquity, startingBalance);
      Object.assign(existing, data);
    } else {
      STATE.propAccounts.push({id:uid(), peakEquity:Math.max(startingBalance,currentEquity), ...data});
    }
    persist(); closeModal(); renderPage();
  });
}
function openUpdateEquityModal(account){
  showModal('Update Equity — '+account.firm, `
    <div class="field"><label>New Current Equity</label><input type="number" step="any" id="ueEquity" value="${account.currentEquity}"></div>
    <div class="card-sub">Peak equity and the drawdown floor update automatically.</div>
  `, ()=>{
    const val = parseFloat(document.getElementById('ueEquity').value);
    if(isNaN(val)) return alert('Please enter a valid number.');
    account.currentEquity = val;
    account.peakEquity = Math.max(account.peakEquity||account.startingBalance, val, account.startingBalance);
    persist(); closeModal(); renderPage();
  });
}

/* ---------- Calendar Page ---------- */
let calCursor = new Date();
function renderCalendarPage(root){
  const y = calCursor.getFullYear(), m = calCursor.getMonth();
  const first = new Date(y,m,1);
  const mon = STATE.settings.weekStart==='mon';
  const startDow = mon ? (first.getDay()+6)%7 : first.getDay();
  const daysInMonth = new Date(y,m+1,0).getDate();
  const todayK = dateKey(new Date());
  const pnlByDay = {}; STATE.trades.forEach(t=>{ pnlByDay[t.date]=(pnlByDay[t.date]||0)+t.pnl; });
  let cells = [];
  for(let i=0;i<startDow;i++) cells.push('<div class="cal-cell muted"></div>');
  for(let d=1; d<=daysInMonth; d++){
    const k = dateKey(new Date(y,m,d));
    const p = pnlByDay[k];
    let cls='cal-cell'; if(k===todayK) cls+=' today'; if(p>0) cls+=' win'; if(p<0) cls+=' loss';
    cells.push(`<div class="${cls}" data-day="${k}"><span class="dnum">${d}</span>${p!==undefined?`<span class="dpnl ${p>=0?'pnl-pos':'pnl-neg'}">${fmtMoney(p)}</span>`:''}</div>`);
  }
  const dows = mon ? ['Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat','Sun'] : ['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat'];
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-head">
      <div class="card-title">${first.toLocaleDateString(undefined,{month:'long',year:'numeric'})}</div>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;"><button class="icon-btn" id="calPrev">‹</button><button class="icon-btn" id="calNext">›</button></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cal-grid">${dows.map(d=>`<div class="cal-head">${d}</div>`).join('')}${cells.join('')}</div>
  </div>`;
  document.getElementById('calPrev').addEventListener('click',()=>{ calCursor = new Date(y,m-1,1); renderPage(); });
  document.getElementById('calNext').addEventListener('click',()=>{ calCursor = new Date(y,m+1,1); renderPage(); });
  root.querySelectorAll('.cal-cell[data-day]').forEach(c=>c.addEventListener('click',()=>openDayModal(c.dataset.day)));
}
function openDayModal(key){
  const dayTrades = STATE.trades.filter(t=>t.date===key);
  const dayJournal = STATE.journal.filter(j=>j.date===key);
  const net = dayTrades.reduce((a,t)=>a+t.pnl,0);
  showModal(fmtShortDate(key), `
    <div style="font-size:22px;font-weight:800;" class="num ${net>=0?'pnl-pos':'pnl-neg'}">${dayTrades.length?fmtMoney(net):'No trades'}</div>
    ${dayTrades.length? tradesFullTable(dayTrades) : ''}
    ${dayJournal.length? `<div style="margin-top:14px;">${dayJournal.map(journalEntryFull).join('')}</div>` : ''}
  `, null, 'Close');
}

/* ---------- Analytics Page ---------- */
function renderAnalyticsPage(root){
  const s = computeStats(STATE.trades);
  const dd = computeDrawdown();
  const byWeekday = groupBy(STATE.trades, t=>parseKey(t.date).toLocaleDateString(undefined,{weekday:'short'}));
  const bySession = groupBy(STATE.trades, t=>t.session||'—');
  const bySetup = groupBy(STATE.trades, t=>t.setup||'—');
  const byAsset = groupBy(STATE.trades, t=>t.asset||'—');
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="grid g-stats" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
    <div class="card stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Expectancy / Trade</div><div class="stat-value num ${s.expectancy>=0?'pnl-pos':'pnl-neg'}">${fmtMoney(s.expectancy)}</div></div>
    <div class="card stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Max Drawdown</div><div class="stat-value num pnl-neg">-${fmtMoneyPlain(dd.maxDD)}</div></div>
    <div class="card stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Max Consecutive Wins</div><div class="stat-value num">${s.maxWin}</div></div>
    <div class="card stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Max Consecutive Losses</div><div class="stat-value num">${s.maxLoss}</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="grid g-2">
    ${breakdownCard('Performance by Weekday', byWeekday)}
    ${breakdownCard('Performance by Session', bySession)}
    ${breakdownCard('Performance by Setup', bySetup)}
    ${breakdownCard('Performance by Instrument', byAsset)}
  </div>`;
}
function groupBy(trades, keyFn){
  const map = {};
  trades.forEach(t=>{ const k = keyFn(t); if(!map[k]) map[k]={net:0,count:0,wins:0}; map[k].net+=t.pnl; map[k].count++; if(t.pnl>0) map[k].wins++; });
  return map;
}
function breakdownCard(title, map){
  const keys = Object.keys(map);
  if(!keys.length) return `<div class="card">${'<div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:10px;">'+title+'</div>'}${emptyState('No data yet','Log trades to see this breakdown.')}</div>`;
  const maxAbs = Math.max(...keys.map(k=>Math.abs(map[k].net)),1);
  return `<div class="card">
    <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:12px;">${title}</div>
    ${keys.map(k=>{
      const v = map[k];
      const pct = Math.abs(v.net)/maxAbs*100;
      return `<div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:5px;">
          <span>${escapeHtml(k)} <span style="color:var(--text-faint);font-weight:600;">(${v.count} · ${(v.wins/v.count*100).toFixed(0)}% win)</span></span>
          <span class="num ${v.net>=0?'pnl-pos':'pnl-neg'}">${fmtMoney(v.net)}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" style="width:${pct}%; background:${v.net>=0?'linear-gradient(90deg,#16a34a,#22c55e)':'linear-gradient(90deg,#be123c,#f43f5e)'};"></div></div>
      </div>`;
    }).join('')}
  </div>`;
}
function computeDrawdown(){
  const asc = sortedByDateAsc(STATE.trades);
  let bal = STATE.settings.startingBalance||100000, peak=bal, maxDD=0;
  asc.forEach(t=>{ bal+=t.pnl; peak=Math.max(peak,bal); maxDD=Math.max(maxDD, peak-bal); });
  return {maxDD};
}

/* ---------- Performance Page ---------- */
function renderPerformancePage(root){
  const s = computeStats(STATE.trades);
  const startBal = STATE.settings.startingBalance||100000;
  const eq = equitySeries(STATE.trades, startBal);
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
    <div class="card-head"><div class="card-title">All-Time Equity Curve</div><div class="card-sub">Starting balance ${fmtMoneyPlain(startBal)}</div></div>
    <canvas id="perfEq" style="width:100%;height:240px;"></canvas>
  </div>
  <div class="grid g-3">
    <div class="card"><div class="stat-label">Current Balance</div><div class="stat-value num">${fmtMoneyPlain(startBal+s.net)}</div></div>
    <div class="card"><div class="stat-label">Total Return</div><div class="stat-value num ${s.net>=0?'pnl-pos':'pnl-neg'}">${(s.net/startBal*100).toFixed(2)}%</div></div>
    <div class="card"><div class="stat-label">Total Trades Logged</div><div class="stat-value num">${s.total}</div></div>
  </div>`;
  drawLineChart(document.getElementById('perfEq'), [
    {data:eq.values, color:'#a855f7', width:2.5, fill:true, dot:true}
  ], {xLabels:eq.labels, xSkip:Math.max(1,Math.floor(eq.labels.length/8)), yFmt:v=>'$'+Math.round(v/1000)+'K'});
}

/* ---------- Goals Page ---------- */
function renderGoalsPage(root){
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="card-head" style="margin-bottom:14px;"><div></div><button class="btn-primary" id="addGoalBtn">＋ New Goal</button></div>
  <div class="card">${STATE.goals.length? STATE.goals.map(goalCard).join('') : emptyState('No goals set','Set a goal to track your progress.')}</div>`;
  document.getElementById('addGoalBtn').addEventListener('click',()=>openGoalModal());
  root.querySelectorAll('.editG').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    const id = e.target.closest('[data-id]').dataset.id; openGoalModal(STATE.goals.find(g=>g.id===id));
  }));
  root.querySelectorAll('.delG').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    const id = e.target.closest('[data-id]').dataset.id; confirmDelete('Delete this goal?', ()=>{ STATE.goals = STATE.goals.filter(g=>g.id!==id); persist(); renderPage(); });
  }));
}
function goalCard(g){
  const pct = Math.min(100, (g.current/g.target)*100 || 0);
  return `<div class="goal-card" data-id="${g.id}">
    <div class="goal-top"><span>${escapeHtml(g.title)}</span><span class="r" style="display:flex;gap:6px;"><button class="icon-sm editG">✏️</button><button class="icon-sm delG">🗑️</button></span></div>
    <div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" style="width:${pct}%;"></div></div>
    <div class="goal-meta">${g.current}${g.unit} of ${g.target}${g.unit} · ${pct.toFixed(0)}% · due ${g.deadline||'—'}</div>
  </div>`;
}
function openGoalModal(existing){
  showModal(existing?'Edit Goal':'New Goal', `
    <div class="field"><label>Goal Title</label><input id="gTitle" value="${existing?escapeHtml(existing.title):''}" placeholder="e.g. Grow account to $150K"></div>
    <div class="field-row">
      <div class="field"><label>Current</label><input type="number" step="any" id="gCurrent" value="${existing?existing.current:0}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Target</label><input type="number" step="any" id="gTarget" value="${existing?existing.target:100}"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="field-row">
      <div class="field"><label>Unit</label><input id="gUnit" value="${existing?existing.unit:'$'}" placeholder="$, %, days…"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Deadline</label><input type="date" id="gDeadline" value="${existing?existing.deadline:''}"></div>
    </div>
  `, ()=>{
    const title = document.getElementById('gTitle').value.trim();
    if(!title) return alert('Please give your goal a title.');
    const data = {title, current:parseFloat(document.getElementById('gCurrent').value)||0, target:parseFloat(document.getElementById('gTarget').value)||1, unit:document.getElementById('gUnit').value||'', deadline:document.getElementById('gDeadline').value};
    if(existing) Object.assign(existing, data); else STATE.goals.push({id:uid(), ...data});
    persist(); closeModal(); renderPage();
  });
}

/* ---------- Notes Page ---------- */
function renderNotesPage(root){
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="card-head" style="margin-bottom:14px;"><div></div><button class="btn-primary" id="addNoteBtn">＋ New Note</button></div>
  <div class="grid g-2">${STATE.notes.length? STATE.notes.map(noteCard).join('') : '<div class="card">'+emptyState('No notes yet','Save playbooks, rules, or ideas here.')+'</div>'}</div>`;
  document.getElementById('addNoteBtn').addEventListener('click',()=>openNoteModal());
  root.querySelectorAll('.editN').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',e=>{ const id=e.target.closest('[data-id]').dataset.id; openNoteModal(STATE.notes.find(n=>n.id===id)); }));
  root.querySelectorAll('.delN').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',e=>{ const id=e.target.closest('[data-id]').dataset.id; confirmDelete('Delete this note?', ()=>{ STATE.notes = STATE.notes.filter(n=>n.id!==id); persist(); renderPage(); }); }));
}
function noteCard(n){
  return `<div class="card" data-id="${n.id}">
    <div class="card-head"><div class="card-title">${escapeHtml(n.title)}</div><span style="display:flex;gap:4px;"><button class="icon-sm editN">✏️</button><button class="icon-sm delN">🗑️</button></span></div>
    <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-dim);line-height:1.6;white-space:pre-wrap;">${escapeHtml(n.text)}</div>
    <div class="card-sub" style="margin-top:10px;">${fmtShortDate(n.date)}</div>
  </div>`;
}
function openNoteModal(existing){
  showModal(existing?'Edit Note':'New Note', `
    <div class="field"><label>Title</label><input id="nTitle" value="${existing?escapeHtml(existing.title):''}" placeholder="e.g. Playbook: London Breakout"></div>
    <div class="field"><label>Content</label><textarea id="nText" style="min-height:140px;">${existing?escapeHtml(existing.text):''}</textarea></div>
  `, ()=>{
    const title = document.getElementById('nTitle').value.trim() || 'Untitled Note';
    const text = document.getElementById('nText').value.trim();
    if(existing) Object.assign(existing, {title, text}); else STATE.notes.push({id:uid(), title, text, date:dateKey(new Date())});
    persist(); closeModal(); renderPage();
  });
}

/* ---------- Assets Page ---------- */
function renderAssetsPage(root){
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="card-head" style="margin-bottom:14px;"><div></div><button class="btn-primary" id="addAssetBtn">＋ New Asset</button></div>
  <div class="card">${STATE.assets.length? STATE.assets.map(a=>`<div class="row-item" data-id="${a.id}"><span class="l">${escapeHtml(a.name)} <span class="card-sub">· ${escapeHtml(a.category)}</span></span><span class="r"><button class="icon-sm delA">🗑️</button></span></div>`).join('') : emptyState('No assets yet','Add the instruments you trade.')}</div>`;
  document.getElementById('addAssetBtn').addEventListener('click',()=>{
    showModal('New Asset', `<div class="field"><label>Symbol</label><input id="aName" placeholder="e.g. USD/JPY"></div><div class="field"><label>Category</label><input id="aCat" placeholder="Forex, Crypto, Index…"></div>`, ()=>{
      const name = document.getElementById('aName').value.trim(); if(!name) return alert('Enter a symbol.');
      STATE.assets.push({id:uid(), name, category:document.getElementById('aCat').value.trim()||'Other'}); persist(); closeModal(); renderPage();
    });
  });
  root.querySelectorAll('.delA').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',e=>{ const id=e.target.closest('[data-id]').dataset.id; confirmDelete('Delete this asset?', ()=>{ STATE.assets = STATE.assets.filter(a=>a.id!==id); persist(); renderPage(); }); }));
}

/* ---------- Tags Page ---------- */
function renderTagsPage(root){
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="card-head" style="margin-bottom:14px;"><div></div><button class="btn-primary" id="addTagBtn">＋ New Tag</button></div>
  <div class="card">${STATE.tags.length? STATE.tags.map(t=>`<div class="row-item" data-id="${t.id}"><span class="l"><span class="color-dot" style="background:${t.color}"></span>${escapeHtml(t.name)}</span><span class="r"><button class="icon-sm delT">🗑️</button></span></div>`).join('') : emptyState('No tags yet','Create tags to label trades and journal entries.')}</div>`;
  document.getElementById('addTagBtn').addEventListener('click',()=>{
    showModal('New Tag', `<div class="field"><label>Name</label><input id="tgName" placeholder="e.g. FOMO"></div><div class="field"><label>Color</label><input type="color" id="tgColor" value="#a855f7"></div>`, ()=>{
      const name = document.getElementById('tgName').value.trim(); if(!name) return alert('Enter a tag name.');
      STATE.tags.push({id:uid(), name, color:document.getElementById('tgColor').value}); persist(); closeModal(); renderPage();
    });
  });
  root.querySelectorAll('.delT').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',e=>{ const id=e.target.closest('[data-id]').dataset.id; confirmDelete('Delete this tag?', ()=>{ STATE.tags = STATE.tags.filter(t=>t.id!==id); persist(); renderPage(); }); }));
}

/* ---------- Tips Page ---------- */
function renderTipsPage(root){
  const specs = Object.entries(FUTURES_SPECS).map(([sym,s])=>`
    <tr><td class="num">${sym}</td><td>${escapeHtml(s.name)}</td><td class="num">${s.tickSize}</td><td class="num">$${s.tickValue}</td><td class="num">$${s.pointValue}</td></tr>
  `).join('');
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="grid g-2" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:10px;">Trading Tips</div>
      <div class="info-grid">
        <div class="info-card"><h4>Before Entry</h4><ul><li>Define the invalidation level before you click.</li><li>Check whether news is close enough to change the trade.</li><li>Only take setups you can explain in one sentence.</li></ul></div>
        <div class="info-card"><h4>Risk Control</h4><ul><li>Use contracts from risk, not from excitement.</li><li>Stop trading after your daily max loss or rule break.</li><li>Never widen a stop to avoid being wrong.</li></ul></div>
        <div class="info-card"><h4>Execution</h4><ul><li>Wait for confirmation at your level.</li><li>If you miss the entry, wait for the next clean setup.</li><li>Scale only from a plan, not from fear.</li></ul></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:10px;">Simple Playbook Ideas</div>
      <div class="stats-list">
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Opening range break</span><span class="v">Break, retest, continuation</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">VWAP pullback</span><span class="v">Trend day continuation</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Failed breakout</span><span class="v">Trap, reclaim, reversal</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Liquidity sweep</span><span class="v">Stop run into key level</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">No-trade zone</span><span class="v">Chop, low volume, emotional state</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-head"><div><div class="card-title">Futures Contract Values</div><div class="card-sub">Used by the automatic P&L calculator. Gross P&L excludes commissions and fees.</div></div></div>
    <div class="fit-table-wrap"><table class="tbl"><thead><tr><th>Symbol</th><th>Contract</th><th>Tick Size</th><th>Tick Value</th><th>Point Value</th></tr></thead><tbody>${specs}</tbody></table></div>
  </div>`;
}

/* ---------- Weekly Reviews Page ---------- */
function currentReviewWindow(){
  const now = new Date();
  const dow = now.getDay();
  const saturday = new Date(now);
  saturday.setHours(0,0,0,0);
  saturday.setDate(now.getDate() - dow + 6);
  const sunday = new Date(saturday);
  sunday.setDate(saturday.getDate() - 6);
  const friday = new Date(saturday);
  friday.setDate(saturday.getDate() - 1);
  return {sunday:dateKey(sunday), friday:dateKey(friday), saturday:dateKey(saturday), isSaturday:dow===6};
}
function buildWeeklyReview(){
  const w = currentReviewWindow();
  const trades = STATE.trades.filter(t=>t.date>=w.sunday && t.date<=w.friday);
  const journals = STATE.journal.filter(j=>j.date>=w.sunday && j.date<=w.friday);
  const s = computeStats(trades);
  const mistakeTags = trades.flatMap(t=>t.tags||[]).concat(journals.flatMap(j=>j.tags||[])).filter(t=>/mistake|revenge|emotion|fomo|overtrade|risk/i.test(t));
  const goodTags = trades.flatMap(t=>t.tags||[]).concat(journals.flatMap(j=>j.tags||[])).filter(t=>/discipline|plan|patience|risk|trend/i.test(t));
  const groupedSetups = Object.entries(groupBy(trades, t=>t.setup||'Unlabeled'));
  const bestSetup = groupedSetups.sort((a,b)=>b[1].net-a[1].net)[0];
  const worstSetup = groupedSetups.sort((a,b)=>a[1].net-b[1].net)[0];
  const notes = [];
  const suggestions = [];
  const psychology = [];
  const setupCount = groupedSetups.length;
  if(s.total===0) notes.push('No trades logged yet for this Sunday-Friday review window.');
  if(s.net>0) notes.push('You finished the reviewed window green. Protect the habits that produced the result.');
  if(s.net<0) notes.push('The week is red. Reduce size and focus on rule quality before trying to make it back.');
  if(s.winRate>=50 && s.profitFactor>=1) notes.push('Win rate and profit factor are both healthy this week.');
  if(s.avgLoss && Math.abs(s.avgLoss)>s.avgWin) notes.push('Average loss is larger than average win. Review exits, stops, and late entries.');
  if(mistakeTags.length) notes.push('Repeated emotional or mistake tags appeared. Write the trigger and the prevention rule.');
  if(goodTags.length) notes.push('Positive process tags showed up. Keep those behaviors specific and repeatable.');
  if(s.maxLoss >= 3) suggestions.push('After three losses in a row, cut size or stop for the session to protect focus.');
  if(s.avgWin && s.avgLoss && Math.abs(s.avgLoss) > s.avgWin) suggestions.push('Your losers are bigger than your winners. Tighten invalidation and avoid late chases.');
  if(setupCount > 0 && bestSetup && worstSetup && bestSetup[0] !== worstSetup[0]) suggestions.push('Lean harder into ' + bestSetup[0] + ' and reduce exposure to ' + worstSetup[0] + ' until execution improves.');
  if(journals.length < 3) suggestions.push('Journal more often during the week so the Saturday review has stronger context.');
  if(s.total > 0 && s.winRate < 40) suggestions.push('Focus next week on A-plus setups only and skip average trades.');
  if(mistakeTags.length) psychology.push('Name the emotion before the next trade. Labeling fear or frustration lowers impulsive decisions.');
  if(s.maxLoss >= 2) psychology.push('Use a reset routine after losing streaks: stand up, breathe, and review your checklist before re-entry.');
  if(s.net > 0) psychology.push('Do not let a green week create overconfidence. Keep size the same until discipline repeats for multiple weeks.');
  if(!psychology.length) psychology.push('Keep grading yourself on rule-following first and money second. Consistency compounds.');
  return {w,trades,journals,s,bestSetup,worstSetup,notes,suggestions,psychology};
}
function renderReviewsPage(root){
  const r = buildWeeklyReview();
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
    <div class="card-head">
      <div><div class="card-title">Saturday Weekly Review</div><div class="card-sub">Reviews logs from ${fmtShortDate(r.w.sunday)} through ${fmtShortDate(r.w.friday)} and refreshes guidance every Saturday.</div></div>
      <span class="pill purple">${r.w.isSaturday ? 'Smart Coach ready' : 'Preview until Saturday'}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="grid g-stats">
      ${statCard('Net P&L', fmtMoney(r.s.net), 'money', 0, r.s.net>=0, null, 'this review')}
      ${statCard('Win Rate', r.s.winRate.toFixed(2)+'%', 'ring', 0, r.s.winRate>=50, r.s.winRate, 'this review')}
      ${statCard('Total Trades', String(r.s.total), 'bars', 0, r.s.total>0, null, 'Sun-Fri')}
      ${statCard('Profit Factor', isFinite(r.s.profitFactor)?r.s.profitFactor.toFixed(2):'inf', 'line', 0, r.s.profitFactor>=1, null, 'this review')}
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="grid g-2" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:10px;">What You Are Doing Right</div>
      <div class="stats-list">
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Best setup</span><span class="v">${r.bestSetup?escapeHtml(r.bestSetup[0]):'No setup yet'}</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Largest win</span><span class="v num pnl-pos">${fmtMoney(r.s.largestWin)}</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Max win streak</span><span class="v">${r.s.maxWin}</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Journal entries</span><span class="v">${r.journals.length}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:10px;">What To Improve</div>
      <div class="stats-list">
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Worst setup</span><span class="v">${r.worstSetup?escapeHtml(r.worstSetup[0]):'No setup yet'}</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Largest loss</span><span class="v num pnl-neg">${fmtMoney(r.s.largestLoss)}</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Max loss streak</span><span class="v">${r.s.maxLoss}</span></div>
        <div class="stats-row"><span class="k">Expectancy</span><span class="v num ${r.s.expectancy>=0?'pnl-pos':'pnl-neg'}">${fmtMoney(r.s.expectancy)}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:10px;">Smart Coach Notes</div>
    <div class="info-grid">
      ${r.notes.map(n=>`<div class="info-card"><p>${escapeHtml(n)}</p></div>`).join('') || '<div class="info-card"><p>Log trades and journal entries Sunday through Friday, then review this page on Saturday.</p></div>'}
      <div class="info-card"><h4>Weekly Suggestions</h4><ul>${(r.suggestions.length ? r.suggestions : ['Keep one primary focus for next week and track it daily.']).map(n=>`<li>${escapeHtml(n)}</li>`).join('')}</ul></div>
      <div class="info-card"><h4>Psychology Help</h4><ul>${r.psychology.map(n=>`<li>${escapeHtml(n)}</li>`).join('')}</ul></div>
      <div class="info-card"><h4>Next Week Focus</h4><p>Pick one behavior to improve: waiting, sizing, stopping, journaling, or walking away. One clear focus beats five vague promises.</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
}

/* ---------- Settings Page ---------- */
function renderSettingsPage(root){
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="grid g-2">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:14px;">Profile</div>
      <div class="field"><label>Display Name</label><input id="setName" value="${escapeHtml(STATE.settings.displayName||'Trader Ghost')}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Starting Balance</label><input type="number" id="setBalance" value="${STATE.settings.startingBalance}"></div>
      <div class="field"><label>Currency</label>
        <select id="setCurrency">
          ${[['$','$ USD'],['€','€ EUR'],['£','£ GBP'],['¥','¥ JPY'],['₹','₹ INR'],['A$','A$ AUD'],['C$','C$ CAD']].map(([sym,label])=>`<option value="${sym}" ${STATE.settings.currency===sym?'selected':''}>${label}</option>`).join('')}
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:14px;">Appearance</div>
      <div class="field"><label>Theme</label>
        <div class="theme-toggle" id="settingsThemeToggle" style="max-width:260px;">
          <button data-t="light">☀️ Light</button><button data-t="dark">🌙 Dark</button><button data-t="system">💻 System</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="field"><label>Density</label>
        <div class="theme-toggle" id="densityToggle" style="max-width:260px;">
          <button data-d="comfortable">Comfortable</button><button data-d="compact">Compact</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card-sub">This app is installable as a PWA — use "Add to Home Screen" or your browser's install icon.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="grid g-2" style="margin-top:18px;">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:14px;">Trading Defaults</div>
      <div class="field-row">
        <div class="field"><label>Default Size / Lots</label><input type="number" step="any" id="setDefaultSize" value="${STATE.settings.defaultSize}"></div>
        <div class="field"><label>Default Session</label>
          <select id="setDefaultSession">
            ${['Asia','London','New York'].map(s=>`<option ${STATE.settings.defaultSession===s?'selected':''}>${s}</option>`).join('')}
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card-sub">Pre-fills new trade entries so you spend less time on repetitive fields.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:14px;">Preferences</div>
      <div class="field-row">
        <div class="field"><label>Week Starts On</label>
          <select id="setWeekStart">
            <option value="sun" ${STATE.settings.weekStart==='sun'?'selected':''}>Sunday</option>
            <option value="mon" ${STATE.settings.weekStart==='mon'?'selected':''}>Monday</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="field"><label>Default Landing Page</label>
          <select id="setLandingPage">
            ${PAGES.filter(p=>!['backup','sync'].includes(p.id)).map(p=>`<option value="${p.id}" ${STATE.settings.landingPage===p.id?'selected':''}>${p.label}</option>`).join('')}
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="field" style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:10px; margin-bottom:0;">
        <label style="margin-bottom:0;">Confirm before deleting items</label>
        <div class="theme-toggle" id="confirmDeleteToggle" style="max-width:140px;">
          <button data-v="on">On</button><button data-v="off">Off</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px;">
    <div class="card-head">
      <div class="card-title">Save Changes</div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-sub" style="margin-bottom:12px;">Theme, density, and delete-confirmation apply instantly. Other fields save when you click below.</div>
    <button class="btn-primary" id="saveSettingsBtn">Save Changes</button>
  </div>
  <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px;">
    <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:10px;">Danger Zone</div>
    <div class="card-sub" style="margin-bottom:12px;">Permanently erase all trades, journal entries, goals, and notes from this device.</div>
    <button class="btn-danger" id="resetAllBtn">Erase All Data</button>
  </div>`;
  syncThemeButtons();
  document.getElementById('settingsThemeToggle').addEventListener('click', e=>{
    const b = e.target.closest('button'); if(b) applyTheme(b.dataset.t);
  });
  root.querySelectorAll('#densityToggle button').forEach(b=>{
    b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.d===STATE.settings.density);
    b.addEventListener('click',()=>{ applyDensity(b.dataset.d); root.querySelectorAll('#densityToggle button').forEach(x=>x.classList.toggle('active', x===b)); });
  });
  root.querySelectorAll('#confirmDeleteToggle button').forEach(b=>{
    const on = STATE.settings.confirmDelete!==false;
    b.classList.toggle('active', (b.dataset.v==='on')===on);
    b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
      STATE.settings.confirmDelete = (b.dataset.v==='on'); persist();
      root.querySelectorAll('#confirmDeleteToggle button').forEach(x=>x.classList.toggle('active', x===b));
    });
  });
  document.getElementById('saveSettingsBtn').addEventListener('click',()=>{
    STATE.settings.startingBalance = parseFloat(document.getElementById('setBalance').value)||100000;
    STATE.settings.displayName = document.getElementById('setName').value.trim() || 'Trader Ghost';
    STATE.settings.currency = document.getElementById('setCurrency').value || '$';
    STATE.settings.defaultSize = parseFloat(document.getElementById('setDefaultSize').value)||1;
    STATE.settings.defaultSession = document.getElementById('setDefaultSession').value;
    STATE.settings.weekStart = document.getElementById('setWeekStart').value;
    STATE.settings.landingPage = document.getElementById('setLandingPage').value;
    applyProfileName();
    persist(); renderPage();
  });
  document.getElementById('resetAllBtn').addEventListener('click',()=>{
    if(confirm('This will permanently erase all your data. Continue?')){ STATE = seedState(); STATE.trades=[]; STATE.journal=[]; STATE.goals=[]; STATE.notes=[]; STATE.propAccounts=[]; persist(); renderPage(); }
  });
}

/* ---------- Backup Page ---------- */
function renderBackupPage(root){
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="grid g-2">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:10px;">Export Backup</div>
      <div class="card-sub" style="margin-bottom:14px;">Download all your data as a JSON file you can keep safe or move to another device.</div>
      <button class="btn-primary" id="exportBtn">⤓ Export JSON</button>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:10px;">Restore Backup</div>
      <div class="card-sub" style="margin-bottom:14px;">Import a previously exported JSON file. This will replace your current data.</div>
      <div class="file-drop" id="importDrop">Click to choose a .json backup file</div>
      <input type="file" id="importFile" accept="application/json" style="display:none;">
    </div>
  </div>`;
  document.getElementById('exportBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(STATE, null, 2)], {type:'application/json'});
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = 'trader-ghost-backup-'+dateKey(new Date())+'.json'; a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  });
  document.getElementById('importDrop').addEventListener('click', ()=>document.getElementById('importFile').click());
  document.getElementById('importFile').addEventListener('change', e=>{
    const file = e.target.files[0]; if(!file) return;
    const reader = new FileReader();
    reader.onload = ()=>{
      try{
        const data = JSON.parse(reader.result);
        if(!data || !Array.isArray(data.trades)) throw new Error('Invalid backup file');
        if(!Array.isArray(data.propAccounts)) data.propAccounts = [];
        STATE = data; persist(); renderPage(); alert('Backup restored successfully.');
      }catch(err){ alert('Could not read this file. Please choose a valid Trader Ghost backup.'); }
    };
    reader.readAsText(file);
  });
}

/* ---------- Device Sync Page ---------- */
function renderSyncPage(root){
  const savedPin = localStorage.getItem(SYNC_PIN_KEY) || '';
  root.innerHTML = `
  <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:18px; max-width:480px;">
    <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:10px;">Device Sync</div>
    <div class="card-sub" style="margin-bottom:16px; line-height:1.6;">
      Type the <b>same 6-digit PIN</b> on your phone and your PC. From then on, anything you log on
      one device shows up on the other in real time — no accounts, no setup.
    </div>
    <div class="field">
      <label>6-digit PIN</label>
      <input id="syncPinInput" value="${escapeHtml(savedPin)}" maxlength="6" inputmode="numeric"
        placeholder="e.g. 482913"
        style="font-size:28px; letter-spacing:6px; text-align:center; font-weight:700; padding:14px;">
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:8px;">
      <button class="btn-primary" id="syncConnectBtn">🔗 Connect</button>
      <button class="btn-ghost" id="syncRandomBtn">🎲 Generate PIN</button>
      <button class="btn-danger" id="syncDisconnectBtn">Disconnect</button>
    </div>
    <div class="card-sub" style="margin-top:16px;">
      Status: <span id="syncStatusLine" style="font-weight:700; color:var(--text);">${escapeHtml(SYNC.status)}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card" style="max-width:480px;">
    <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:8px;">How it works</div>
    <div class="card-sub" style="line-height:1.6;">
      Your PIN creates a private channel between your devices. Whichever device connects first
      shares its current data; after that, every change syncs automatically both ways.
      Anyone who guesses your exact PIN could technically read/write on that channel too, so treat
      it like a light password — a random 6-digit code is safer than something predictable.
    </div>
  </div>`;
  document.getElementById('syncConnectBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    const pin = document.getElementById('syncPinInput').value.trim();
    connectSync(pin);
  });
  document.getElementById('syncRandomBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    document.getElementById('syncPinInput').value = randomPin();
  });
  document.getElementById('syncDisconnectBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    disconnectSync();
    renderPage();
  });
}

/* ---------- Modal system ---------- */
function showModal(title, bodyHtml, onSave, saveLabel){
  const bg = document.getElementById('modalBg');
  const box = document.getElementById('modalBox');
  box.innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal-head"><h3>${escapeHtml(title)}</h3><button class="modal-close" id="modalCloseBtn">✕</button></div>
    <div id="modalBody">${bodyHtml}</div>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-ghost" id="modalCancelBtn">${onSave?'Cancel':(saveLabel||'Close')}</button>
      ${onSave?`<button class="btn-primary" id="modalSaveBtn">Save</button>`:''}
    </div>`;
  bg.classList.add('show');
  document.getElementById('modalCloseBtn').addEventListener('click', closeModal);
  document.getElementById('modalCancelBtn').addEventListener('click', closeModal);
  if(onSave) document.getElementById('modalSaveBtn').addEventListener('click', onSave);
  bg.onclick = (e)=>{ if(e.target===bg) closeModal(); };
}
function closeModal(){ document.getElementById('modalBg').classList.remove('show'); }

/* ---------- Theme ---------- */
function applyTheme(mode){
  STATE.settings.theme = mode;
  const effective = mode==='system' ? (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches?'dark':'light') : mode;
  document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', effective);
  persist();
  syncThemeButtons();
}
function applyDensity(mode){
  STATE.settings.density = mode;
  document.body.classList.toggle('density-compact', mode==='compact');
  persist();
}
function applyProfileName(){
  const el = document.getElementById('profileName');
  if(el) el.textContent = STATE.settings.displayName || 'Trader Ghost';
}
function syncThemeButtons(){
  document.querySelectorAll('#themeToggle button, #settingsThemeToggle button').forEach(b=>{
    b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.t===STATE.settings.theme);
  });
}

/* ---------- Global wiring ---------- */
function wireGlobal(){
  document.getElementById('menuBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('open'));
  document.getElementById('newTradeBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>openTradeModal());
  document.getElementById('themeToggle').addEventListener('click', e=>{
    const b = e.target.closest('button'); if(b) applyTheme(b.dataset.t);
  });
  document.getElementById('searchBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    const q = prompt('Search trades and journal entries:'); if(!q) return;
    const ql = q.toLowerCase();
    const tradeHits = STATE.trades.filter(t=>[t.asset,t.setup,t.session,t.notes].join(' ').toLowerCase().includes(ql));
    const jHits = STATE.journal.filter(j=>j.text.toLowerCase().includes(ql));
    showModal(`Search results for "${q}"`, `
      <div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:8px;">Trades (${tradeHits.length})</div>${tradeHits.length?tradesFullTable(tradeHits):emptyState('No trades found','')}
      <div class="card-title" style="margin:14px 0 8px;">Journal (${jHits.length})</div>${jHits.length?jHits.map(journalEntryFull).join(''):emptyState('No entries found','')}
    `, null, 'Close');
  });
  document.getElementById('notifBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    showModal('Notifications', emptyState('All caught up','No new notifications right now.'), null, 'Close');
  });
  document.getElementById('drPrev').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ dashOffset++; renderPage(); });
  document.getElementById('drNext').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ if(dashOffset>0){ dashOffset--; renderPage(); } });
  window.addEventListener('resize', ()=>{ if(currentPage) renderPage(); });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e=>{ if(e.key==='Escape') closeModal(); });
  if(window.matchMedia){
    window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').addEventListener('change', ()=>{ if(STATE.settings.theme==='system') applyTheme('system'); });
  }
}

/* ---------- Init ---------- */
function init(){
  setBranding();
  applyTheme(STATE.settings.theme||'dark');
  applyDensity(STATE.settings.density||'comfortable');
  renderNav();
  wireGlobal();
  goTo(STATE.settings.landingPage||'dashboard');
  tryAutoConnectSync();
  const loader = document.getElementById('loader');
  setTimeout(()=>{ loader.style.transition='opacity .35s ease'; loader.style.opacity='0'; setTimeout(()=>loader.remove(), 400); }, 350);
}
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);

})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
